USERMESSAGE #38
✓ TOOL RESULT
SUCCESS 
     1→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     2→// Main Simulation Engine
     3→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     4→//
     5→// Manages the game clock and drives the object engine + characters.
     6→// Ticks at configurable intervals (~5 seconds default).
     7→// Provides start/stop/pause controls and an event bus.
     8→
     9→import { ObjectEngine } from './objects.js';
    10→import { OBJECT_DEFS, SECTORS, WORLD_TREE } from './world.js';
    11→import { Character, CHARACTER_DEFS, findInteractTile } from './characters.js';
    12→
    13→export class SimulationEngine {
    14→  constructor(options = {}) {
    15→    this.tickIntervalMs = options.tickIntervalMs ?? 5000; // ~5 seconds
    16→    this.timeScale = options.timeScale ?? 1;              // speed multiplier
    17→
    18→    this.objectEngine = new ObjectEngine();
    19→    this.running = false;
    20→    this.paused = false;
    21→    this.elapsedMs = 0;         // total simulation time
    22→    this.tickCount = 0;
    23→    this.listeners = new Map();  // event type → Set<callback>
    24→
    25→    this._rafId = null;
    26→    this._lastTimestamp = null;
    27→    this._accumulator = 0;       // accumulated time toward next tick
    28→
    29→    // Load world
    30→    this.objectEngine.addObjects(OBJECT_DEFS);
    31→    this.sectors = SECTORS;
    32→    this.worldTree = WORLD_TREE;
    33→
    34→    // Load characters
    35→    this.characters = CHARACTER_DEFS.map(def => new Character(def));
    36→
    37→    // AI integration
    38→    this.aiEngine = options.aiEngine || null;
    39→    this.aiMode = false;
    40→
    41→    // Simulated clock — starts at 8:00 AM on Day 1
    42→    // Each tick advances 5 sim-minutes → 1 sim-day per ~24 real minutes at 1x
    43→    this.simClock = {
    44→      day: 1,
    45→      minuteOfDay: 480,
    46→      simMinutesPerTick: 5,
    47→      get hour() { return Math.floor(this.minuteOfDay / 60); },
    48→      get minute() { return Math.floor(this.minuteOfDay % 60); },
    49→      get timeString() {
    50→        const h = this.hour;
    51→        const m = this.minute;
    52→        const period = h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';
    53→        const h12 = h % 12 || 12;
    54→        return `${h12}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')} ${period}`;
    55→      },
    56→      get dayTimeString() {
    57→        return `Day ${this.day} \u2014 ${this.timeString}`;
    58→      },
    59→      advance() {
    60→        this.minuteOfDay += this.simMinutesPerTick;
    61→        while (this.minuteOfDay >= 1440) {
    62→          this.minuteOfDay -= 1440;
    63→          this.day++;
    64→        }
    65→      },
    66→    };
    67→
    68→    // Last notable event for the status bar
    69→    this.lastStatusText = '';
    70→
    71→    // Forward object events to our bus
    72→    this.objectEngine.onTransition((event) => {
    73→      this._emit('object:transition', event);
    74→      this._reactToObjectEvent(event);
    75→    });
    76→
    77→    // Attach AI engine
    78→    if (this.aiEngine) {
    79→      this.aiEngine.attach(this);
    80→    }
    81→  }
    82→
    83→  start() {
    84→    if (this.running) return;
    85→    this.running = true;
    86→    this.paused = false;
    87→    this._lastTimestamp = performance.now();
    88→    this._accumulator = 0;
    89→    this._emit('engine:start', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });
    90→    this._loop();
    91→  }
    92→
    93→  stop() {
    94→    this.running = false;
    95→    this.paused = false;
    96→    if (this._rafId) {
    97→      cancelAnimationFrame(this._rafId);
    98→      this._rafId = null;
    99→    }
   100→    this._emit('engine:stop', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs, tickCount: this.tickCount });
   101→  }
   102→
   103→  pause() {
   104→    if (!this.running) return;
   105→    this.paused = true;
   106→    this._emit('engine:pause', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  resume() {
   110→    if (!this.running || !this.paused) return;
   111→    this.paused = false;
   112→    this._lastTimestamp = performance.now();
   113→    this._emit('engine:resume', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });
   114→  }
   115→
   116→  // Manually advance by a number of ticks (useful for testing)
   117→  manualTick(count = 1) {
   118→    const events = [];
   119→    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   120→      const tickEvents = this.objectEngine.tick(this.tickIntervalMs);
   121→      this.tickCount++;
   122→      this.elapsedMs += this.tickIntervalMs;
   123→      this._wanderTick();
   124→      this._updateCharacters(this.tickIntervalMs);
   125→      events.push(...tickEvents);
   126→    }
   127→    this._emit('engine:tick', {
   128→      tickCount: this.tickCount,
   129→      elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,
   130→      events,
   131→    });
   132→    return events;
   133→  }
   134→
   135→  // Interact with an object (character-triggered)
   136→  interact(objectId, action = 'use') {
   137→    return this.objectEngine.interact(objectId, action);
   138→  }
   139→
   140→  // Get object by id
   141→  getObject(objectId) {
   142→    return this.objectEngine.get(objectId);
   143→  }
   144→
   145→  // Get all objects
   146→  getAllObjects() {
   147→    return this.objectEngine.getAll();
   148→  }
   149→
   150→  // Get objects in a sector
   151→  getObjectsInSector(sector) {
   152→    return this.objectEngine.getBySector(sector);
   153→  }
   154→
   155→  // Get all characters
   156→  getCharacters() {
   157→    return this.characters;
   158→  }
   159→
   160→  // Full state snapshot
   161→  snapshot() {
   162→    return {
   163→      running: this.running,
   164→      paused: this.paused,
   165→      elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,
   166→      tickCount: this.tickCount,
   167→      tickIntervalMs: this.tickIntervalMs,
   168→      timeScale: this.timeScale,
   169→      aiMode: this.aiMode,
   170→      simClock: { day: this.simClock.day, time: this.simClock.timeString },
   171→      objects: this.objectEngine.snapshot(),
   172→      characters: this.characters.map(c => ({
   173→        id: c.id, name: c.name, tx: c.tx, ty: c.ty,
   174→        action: c.action, facing: c.facing, mood: c.mood,
   175→        targetObjectId: c.targetObjectId,
   176→      })),
   177→    };
   178→  }
   179→
   180→  // ── Event bus ──
   181→
   182→  on(eventType, callback) {
   183→    if (!this.listeners.has(eventType)) {
   184→      this.listeners.set(eventType, new Set());
   185→    }
   186→    this.listeners.get(eventType).add(callback);
   187→    return () => this.off(eventType, callback);
   188→  }
   189→
   190→  off(eventType, callback) {
   191→    this.listeners.get(eventType)?.delete(callback);
   192→  }
   193→
   194→  _emit(eventType, data) {
   195→    const callbacks = this.listeners.get(eventType);
   196→    if (callbacks) {
   197→      for (const cb of callbacks) {
   198→        cb(data);
   199→      }
   200→    }
   201→    // Also emit wildcard
   202→    const wildcards = this.listeners.get('*');
   203→    if (wildcards) {
   204→      for (const cb of wildcards) {
   205→        cb({ type: eventType, ...data });
   206→      }
   207→    }
   208→  }
   209→
   210→  // ── Character AI / Wander behavior ──
   211→
   212→  _wanderTick() {
   213→    // Advance simulated clock each tick
   214→    this.simClock.advance();
   215→
   216→    for (const char of this.characters) {
   217→      if (char.action !== 'idle') continue;
   218→
   219→      // AI mode: delegate to AI decision engine
   220→      if (this.aiMode && this.aiEngine) {
   221→        if (!this.aiEngine.isPending(char.id)) {
   222→          this.aiEngine.tick(char, this.tickIntervalMs);
   223→        }
   224→        continue;
   225→      }
   226→
   227→      // Random wander with cooldown
   228→      char.wanderCooldown -= this.tickIntervalMs;
   229→      if (char.wanderCooldown > 0) continue;
   230→
   231→      // Priority actions first (reactive behavior), then random wander
   232→      const priority = this._getPriorityTarget(char);
   233→      const target = priority ? priority.obj : this._pickWanderTarget(char);
   234→      const action = priority ? priority.action : 'use';
   235→
   236→      if (!target) {
   237→        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;
   238→        continue;
   239→      }
   240→
   241→      const tile = findInteractTile(target.position);
   242→      if (!tile) {
   243→        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;
   244→        continue;
   245→      }
   246→
   247→      // Already adjacent — interact directly
   248→      const atTarget = tile.tx === Math.round(char.tx) && tile.ty === Math.round(char.ty);
   249→      if (atTarget) {
   250→        this._doInteraction(char, target, action);
   251→        char.wanderCooldown = 30000 + Math.random() * 30000;
   252→      } else if (char.moveTo(tile.tx, tile.ty)) {
   253→        char.targetObjectId = target.id;
   254→        char.pendingAction = action;
   255→        char.wanderCooldown = 30000 + Math.random() * 30000;
   256→      } else {
   257→        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;
   258→      }
   259→    }
   260→  }
   261→
   262→  /** Immediate random wander (no cooldown) — used as AI fallback. */
   263→  _randomWander(char) {
   264→    const priority = this._getPriorityTarget(char);
   265→    const target = priority ? priority.obj : this._pickWanderTarget(char);
   266→    const action = priority ? priority.action : 'use';
   267→
   268→    if (!target) return;
   269→
   270→    const tile = findInteractTile(target.position);
   271→    if (!tile) return;
   272→
   273→    const atTarget = tile.tx === Math.round(char.tx) && tile.ty === Math.round(char.ty);
   274→    if (atTarget) {
   275→      this._doInteraction(char, target, action);
   276→    } else if (char.moveTo(tile.tx, tile.ty)) {
   277→      char.targetObjectId = target.id;
   278→      char.pendingAction = action;
   279→    }
   280→  }
   281→
   282→  _updateCharacters(deltaMs) {
   283→    for (const char of this.characters) {
   284→      const wasWalking = char.action === 'walking';
   285→      char.update(deltaMs);
   286→
   287→      // Character just arrived at destination
   288→      if (wasWalking && char.action === 'idle') {
   289→        if (char.targetObjectId) {
   290→          const obj = this.objectEngine.get(char.targetObjectId);
   291→          if (obj) {
   292→            this._doInteraction(char, obj, char.pendingAction || 'use');
   293→          } else {
   294→            char.targetObjectId = null;
   295→          }
   296→          char.pendingAction = 'use';
   297→        } else if (char.targetCharId) {
   298→          // Character arrived near another character for conversation — face each other
   299→          const target = this.characters.find(c => c.id === char.targetCharId);
   300→          if (target) {
   301→            char._updateFacing(target.tx - char.tx, target.ty - char.ty);
   302→            target._updateFacing(char.tx - target.tx, char.ty - target.ty);
   303→          }
   304→          char.targetCharId = null;
   305→        }
   306→      }
   307→    }
   308→  }
   309→
   310→  // ── Object → interaction animation mapping ──
   311→  // Maps object ID substrings to the animation played during interaction.
   312→  static _getInteractAnim(objectId) {
   313→    if (!objectId) return null;
   314→    if (objectId.includes('book') || objectId.includes('desk') || objectId.includes('bookshelf')) {
   315→      return 'reading';
   316→    }
   317→    if (objectId.includes('bed') || objectId.includes('kotatsu') || objectId.includes('sofa') || objectId.includes('tv')) {
   318→      return 'sit';
   319→    }
   320→    // phone / general interaction fallback for everything else
   321→    return 'phone';
   322→  }
   323→
   324→  _doInteraction(char, obj, action = 'use') {
   325→    // Face toward the object
   326→    const objCx = obj.position.tx + (obj.position.tw || 1) / 2;
   327→    const objCy = obj.position.ty + (obj.position.th || 1) / 2;
   328→    const dx = objCx - char.tx;
   329→    const dy = objCy - char.ty;
   330→    if (Math.abs(dx) >= Math.abs(dy)) {
   331→      char._updateFacing(dx, 0);
   332→    } else {
   333→      char._updateFacing(0, dy);
   334→    }
   335→
   336→    const event = this.objectEngine.interact(obj.id, action);
   337→    if (event) {
   338→      const anim = SimulationEngine._getInteractAnim(obj.id);
   339→      char.startInteraction(obj.id, anim);
   340→
   341→      // Successful interaction → happy (unless already upset)
   342→      if (char.mood !== 'upset') {
   343→        char.setMood('happy', 5000);
   344→      }
   345→
   346→      this._emit('character:interact', {
   347→        characterId: char.id, characterName: char.name,
   348→        objectId: obj.id, objectName: event.objectName,
   349→        from: event.from, to: event.to,
   350→        produces: event.produces || null,
   351→        emoji: event.emoji || null,
   352→      });
   353→    } else {
   354→      char.targetObjectId = null;
   355→    }
   356→  }
   357→
   358→  _getPriorityTarget(char) {
   359→    // Sol: pick up book if closed and nearby
   360→    if (char.id === 'sol') {
   361→      const book = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_book');
   362→      if (book && book.state === 'closed') {
   363→        const dist = Math.abs(book.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(book.position.ty - char.ty);
   364→        if (dist <= 6) {
   365→          return { obj: book, action: 'use' };
   366→        }
   367→      }
   368→    }
   369→
   370→    // Non-Maple near stocked display → take pastry
   371→    if (char.id !== 'maple') {
   372→      const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');
   373→      if (display && display.state === 'stocked') {
   374→        const dist = Math.abs(display.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(display.position.ty - char.ty);
   375→        if (dist <= 8) {
   376→          return { obj: display, action: 'use' };
   377→        }
   378→      }
   379→    }
   380→
   381→    // Maple: restock empty display case
   382→    if (char.id === 'maple') {
   383→      const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');
   384→      if (display && display.state === 'empty') {
   385→        return { obj: display, action: 'use' };
   386→      }
   387→    }
   388→
   389→    return null;
   390→  }
   391→
   392→  _pickWanderTarget(char) {
   393→    const allObjects = this.objectEngine.getAll();
   394→
   395→    // 60% home sector, 40% any sector
   396→    let candidates;
   397→    if (Math.random() < 0.6) {
   398→      candidates = allObjects.filter(o => o.sector === char.homeSector);
   399→      if (candidates.length === 0) candidates = allObjects;
   400→    } else {
   401→      candidates = allObjects;
   402→    }
   403→
   404→    // Avoid repeating last interaction
   405→    if (char.lastObjectId && candidates.length > 1) {
   406→      candidates = candidates.filter(o => o.id !== char.lastObjectId);
   407→    }
   408→
   409→    if (candidates.length === 0) return null;
   410→    return candidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length)];
   411→  }
   412→
   413→  _reactToObjectEvent(event) {
   414→    // Espresso done → Maple happy
   415→    if (event.objectId === 'cafe_espresso' && event.to === 'done') {
   416→      const maple = this.characters.find(c => c.id === 'maple');
   417→      if (maple) maple.setMood('happy', 10000);
   418→    }
   419→
   420→    // Easel finished → Nyx happy
   421→    if (event.objectId === 'apt_easel' && event.to === 'finished') {
   422→      const nyx = this.characters.find(c => c.id === 'nyx');
   423→      if (nyx) nyx.setMood('happy', 20000);
   424→    }
   425→
   426→    // Display restocked → nearby characters happy
   427→    if (event.objectId === 'cafe_display' && event.to === 'stocked') {
   428→      for (const char of this.characters) {
   429→        const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');
   430→        if (display) {
   431→          const dist = Math.abs(display.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(display.position.ty - char.ty);
   432→          if (dist <= 6) char.setMood('happy', 10000);
   433→        }
   434→      }
   435→    }
   436→  }
   437→
   438→  // ── Internal loop ──
   439→
   440→  _loop() {
   441→    if (!this.running) return;
   442→
   443→    this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame((timestamp) => {
   444→      if (!this.running) return;
   445→
   446→      if (!this.paused) {
   447→        const rawDelta = timestamp - this._lastTimestamp;
   448→        const delta = Math.min(rawDelta, 500) * this.timeScale; // cap delta, apply scale
   449→
   450→        this._accumulator += delta;
   451→
   452→        // Process full ticks
   453→        while (this._accumulator >= this.tickIntervalMs) {
   454→          this._accumulator -= this.tickIntervalMs;
   455→          const tickEvents = this.objectEngine.tick(this.tickIntervalMs);
   456→          this.tickCount++;
   457→          this.elapsedMs += this.tickIntervalMs;
   458→
   459→          this._wanderTick();
   460→
   461→          this._emit('engine:tick', {
   462→            tickCount: this.tickCount,
   463→            elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,
   464→            events: tickEvents,
   465→          });
   466→        }
   467→
   468→        // Smooth character movement each frame
   469→        this._updateCharacters(delta);
   470→      }
   471→
   472→      this._lastTimestamp = timestamp;
   473→      this._loop();
   474→    });
   475→  }
   476→}
   477→

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

{
  "content": {
    "tool_use_id": "toolu_016SAQ3662RhGh9kkBrSwphb",
    "type": "tool_result",
    "content": "     1\u2192// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n     2\u2192// Main Simulation Engine\n     3\u2192// \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\n     4\u2192//\n     5\u2192// Manages the game clock and drives the object engine + characters.\n     6\u2192// Ticks at configurable intervals (~5 seconds default).\n     7\u2192// Provides start/stop/pause controls and an event bus.\n     8\u2192\n     9\u2192import { ObjectEngine } from './objects.js';\n    10\u2192import { OBJECT_DEFS, SECTORS, WORLD_TREE } from './world.js';\n    11\u2192import { Character, CHARACTER_DEFS, findInteractTile } from './characters.js';\n    12\u2192\n    13\u2192export class SimulationEngine {\n    14\u2192  constructor(options = {}) {\n    15\u2192    this.tickIntervalMs = options.tickIntervalMs ?? 5000; // ~5 seconds\n    16\u2192    this.timeScale = options.timeScale ?? 1;              // speed multiplier\n    17\u2192\n    18\u2192    this.objectEngine = new ObjectEngine();\n    19\u2192    this.running = false;\n    20\u2192    this.paused = false;\n    21\u2192    this.elapsedMs = 0;         // total simulation time\n    22\u2192    this.tickCount = 0;\n    23\u2192    this.listeners = new Map();  // event type \u2192 Set<callback>\n    24\u2192\n    25\u2192    this._rafId = null;\n    26\u2192    this._lastTimestamp = null;\n    27\u2192    this._accumulator = 0;       // accumulated time toward next tick\n    28\u2192\n    29\u2192    // Load world\n    30\u2192    this.objectEngine.addObjects(OBJECT_DEFS);\n    31\u2192    this.sectors = SECTORS;\n    32\u2192    this.worldTree = WORLD_TREE;\n    33\u2192\n    34\u2192    // Load characters\n    35\u2192    this.characters = CHARACTER_DEFS.map(def => new Character(def));\n    36\u2192\n    37\u2192    // AI integration\n    38\u2192    this.aiEngine = options.aiEngine || null;\n    39\u2192    this.aiMode = false;\n    40\u2192\n    41\u2192    // Simulated clock \u2014 starts at 8:00 AM on Day 1\n    42\u2192    // Each tick advances 5 sim-minutes \u2192 1 sim-day per ~24 real minutes at 1x\n    43\u2192    this.simClock = {\n    44\u2192      day: 1,\n    45\u2192      minuteOfDay: 480,\n    46\u2192      simMinutesPerTick: 5,\n    47\u2192      get hour() { return Math.floor(this.minuteOfDay / 60); },\n    48\u2192      get minute() { return Math.floor(this.minuteOfDay % 60); },\n    49\u2192      get timeString() {\n    50\u2192        const h = this.hour;\n    51\u2192        const m = this.minute;\n    52\u2192        const period = h >= 12 ? 'PM' : 'AM';\n    53\u2192        const h12 = h % 12 || 12;\n    54\u2192        return `${h12}:${String(m).padStart(2, '0')} ${period}`;\n    55\u2192      },\n    56\u2192      get dayTimeString() {\n    57\u2192        return `Day ${this.day} \\u2014 ${this.timeString}`;\n    58\u2192      },\n    59\u2192      advance() {\n    60\u2192        this.minuteOfDay += this.simMinutesPerTick;\n    61\u2192        while (this.minuteOfDay >= 1440) {\n    62\u2192          this.minuteOfDay -= 1440;\n    63\u2192          this.day++;\n    64\u2192        }\n    65\u2192      },\n    66\u2192    };\n    67\u2192\n    68\u2192    // Last notable event for the status bar\n    69\u2192    this.lastStatusText = '';\n    70\u2192\n    71\u2192    // Forward object events to our bus\n    72\u2192    this.objectEngine.onTransition((event) => {\n    73\u2192      this._emit('object:transition', event);\n    74\u2192      this._reactToObjectEvent(event);\n    75\u2192    });\n    76\u2192\n    77\u2192    // Attach AI engine\n    78\u2192    if (this.aiEngine) {\n    79\u2192      this.aiEngine.attach(this);\n    80\u2192    }\n    81\u2192  }\n    82\u2192\n    83\u2192  start() {\n    84\u2192    if (this.running) return;\n    85\u2192    this.running = true;\n    86\u2192    this.paused = false;\n    87\u2192    this._lastTimestamp = performance.now();\n    88\u2192    this._accumulator = 0;\n    89\u2192    this._emit('engine:start', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });\n    90\u2192    this._loop();\n    91\u2192  }\n    92\u2192\n    93\u2192  stop() {\n    94\u2192    this.running = false;\n    95\u2192    this.paused = false;\n    96\u2192    if (this._rafId) {\n    97\u2192      cancelAnimationFrame(this._rafId);\n    98\u2192      this._rafId = null;\n    99\u2192    }\n   100\u2192    this._emit('engine:stop', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs, tickCount: this.tickCount });\n   101\u2192  }\n   102\u2192\n   103\u2192  pause() {\n   104\u2192    if (!this.running) return;\n   105\u2192    this.paused = true;\n   106\u2192    this._emit('engine:pause', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });\n   107\u2192  }\n   108\u2192\n   109\u2192  resume() {\n   110\u2192    if (!this.running || !this.paused) return;\n   111\u2192    this.paused = false;\n   112\u2192    this._lastTimestamp = performance.now();\n   113\u2192    this._emit('engine:resume', { elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs });\n   114\u2192  }\n   115\u2192\n   116\u2192  // Manually advance by a number of ticks (useful for testing)\n   117\u2192  manualTick(count = 1) {\n   118\u2192    const events = [];\n   119\u2192    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n   120\u2192      const tickEvents = this.objectEngine.tick(this.tickIntervalMs);\n   121\u2192      this.tickCount++;\n   122\u2192      this.elapsedMs += this.tickIntervalMs;\n   123\u2192      this._wanderTick();\n   124\u2192      this._updateCharacters(this.tickIntervalMs);\n   125\u2192      events.push(...tickEvents);\n   126\u2192    }\n   127\u2192    this._emit('engine:tick', {\n   128\u2192      tickCount: this.tickCount,\n   129\u2192      elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,\n   130\u2192      events,\n   131\u2192    });\n   132\u2192    return events;\n   133\u2192  }\n   134\u2192\n   135\u2192  // Interact with an object (character-triggered)\n   136\u2192  interact(objectId, action = 'use') {\n   137\u2192    return this.objectEngine.interact(objectId, action);\n   138\u2192  }\n   139\u2192\n   140\u2192  // Get object by id\n   141\u2192  getObject(objectId) {\n   142\u2192    return this.objectEngine.get(objectId);\n   143\u2192  }\n   144\u2192\n   145\u2192  // Get all objects\n   146\u2192  getAllObjects() {\n   147\u2192    return this.objectEngine.getAll();\n   148\u2192  }\n   149\u2192\n   150\u2192  // Get objects in a sector\n   151\u2192  getObjectsInSector(sector) {\n   152\u2192    return this.objectEngine.getBySector(sector);\n   153\u2192  }\n   154\u2192\n   155\u2192  // Get all characters\n   156\u2192  getCharacters() {\n   157\u2192    return this.characters;\n   158\u2192  }\n   159\u2192\n   160\u2192  // Full state snapshot\n   161\u2192  snapshot() {\n   162\u2192    return {\n   163\u2192      running: this.running,\n   164\u2192      paused: this.paused,\n   165\u2192      elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,\n   166\u2192      tickCount: this.tickCount,\n   167\u2192      tickIntervalMs: this.tickIntervalMs,\n   168\u2192      timeScale: this.timeScale,\n   169\u2192      aiMode: this.aiMode,\n   170\u2192      simClock: { day: this.simClock.day, time: this.simClock.timeString },\n   171\u2192      objects: this.objectEngine.snapshot(),\n   172\u2192      characters: this.characters.map(c => ({\n   173\u2192        id: c.id, name: c.name, tx: c.tx, ty: c.ty,\n   174\u2192        action: c.action, facing: c.facing, mood: c.mood,\n   175\u2192        targetObjectId: c.targetObjectId,\n   176\u2192      })),\n   177\u2192    };\n   178\u2192  }\n   179\u2192\n   180\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Event bus \u2500\u2500\n   181\u2192\n   182\u2192  on(eventType, callback) {\n   183\u2192    if (!this.listeners.has(eventType)) {\n   184\u2192      this.listeners.set(eventType, new Set());\n   185\u2192    }\n   186\u2192    this.listeners.get(eventType).add(callback);\n   187\u2192    return () => this.off(eventType, callback);\n   188\u2192  }\n   189\u2192\n   190\u2192  off(eventType, callback) {\n   191\u2192    this.listeners.get(eventType)?.delete(callback);\n   192\u2192  }\n   193\u2192\n   194\u2192  _emit(eventType, data) {\n   195\u2192    const callbacks = this.listeners.get(eventType);\n   196\u2192    if (callbacks) {\n   197\u2192      for (const cb of callbacks) {\n   198\u2192        cb(data);\n   199\u2192      }\n   200\u2192    }\n   201\u2192    // Also emit wildcard\n   202\u2192    const wildcards = this.listeners.get('*');\n   203\u2192    if (wildcards) {\n   204\u2192      for (const cb of wildcards) {\n   205\u2192        cb({ type: eventType, ...data });\n   206\u2192      }\n   207\u2192    }\n   208\u2192  }\n   209\u2192\n   210\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Character AI / Wander behavior \u2500\u2500\n   211\u2192\n   212\u2192  _wanderTick() {\n   213\u2192    // Advance simulated clock each tick\n   214\u2192    this.simClock.advance();\n   215\u2192\n   216\u2192    for (const char of this.characters) {\n   217\u2192      if (char.action !== 'idle') continue;\n   218\u2192\n   219\u2192      // AI mode: delegate to AI decision engine\n   220\u2192      if (this.aiMode && this.aiEngine) {\n   221\u2192        if (!this.aiEngine.isPending(char.id)) {\n   222\u2192          this.aiEngine.tick(char, this.tickIntervalMs);\n   223\u2192        }\n   224\u2192        continue;\n   225\u2192      }\n   226\u2192\n   227\u2192      // Random wander with cooldown\n   228\u2192      char.wanderCooldown -= this.tickIntervalMs;\n   229\u2192      if (char.wanderCooldown > 0) continue;\n   230\u2192\n   231\u2192      // Priority actions first (reactive behavior), then random wander\n   232\u2192      const priority = this._getPriorityTarget(char);\n   233\u2192      const target = priority ? priority.obj : this._pickWanderTarget(char);\n   234\u2192      const action = priority ? priority.action : 'use';\n   235\u2192\n   236\u2192      if (!target) {\n   237\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;\n   238\u2192        continue;\n   239\u2192      }\n   240\u2192\n   241\u2192      const tile = findInteractTile(target.position);\n   242\u2192      if (!tile) {\n   243\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;\n   244\u2192        continue;\n   245\u2192      }\n   246\u2192\n   247\u2192      // Already adjacent \u2014 interact directly\n   248\u2192      const atTarget = tile.tx === Math.round(char.tx) && tile.ty === Math.round(char.ty);\n   249\u2192      if (atTarget) {\n   250\u2192        this._doInteraction(char, target, action);\n   251\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 30000 + Math.random() * 30000;\n   252\u2192      } else if (char.moveTo(tile.tx, tile.ty)) {\n   253\u2192        char.targetObjectId = target.id;\n   254\u2192        char.pendingAction = action;\n   255\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 30000 + Math.random() * 30000;\n   256\u2192      } else {\n   257\u2192        char.wanderCooldown = 5000;\n   258\u2192      }\n   259\u2192    }\n   260\u2192  }\n   261\u2192\n   262\u2192  /** Immediate random wander (no cooldown) \u2014 used as AI fallback. */\n   263\u2192  _randomWander(char) {\n   264\u2192    const priority = this._getPriorityTarget(char);\n   265\u2192    const target = priority ? priority.obj : this._pickWanderTarget(char);\n   266\u2192    const action = priority ? priority.action : 'use';\n   267\u2192\n   268\u2192    if (!target) return;\n   269\u2192\n   270\u2192    const tile = findInteractTile(target.position);\n   271\u2192    if (!tile) return;\n   272\u2192\n   273\u2192    const atTarget = tile.tx === Math.round(char.tx) && tile.ty === Math.round(char.ty);\n   274\u2192    if (atTarget) {\n   275\u2192      this._doInteraction(char, target, action);\n   276\u2192    } else if (char.moveTo(tile.tx, tile.ty)) {\n   277\u2192      char.targetObjectId = target.id;\n   278\u2192      char.pendingAction = action;\n   279\u2192    }\n   280\u2192  }\n   281\u2192\n   282\u2192  _updateCharacters(deltaMs) {\n   283\u2192    for (const char of this.characters) {\n   284\u2192      const wasWalking = char.action === 'walking';\n   285\u2192      char.update(deltaMs);\n   286\u2192\n   287\u2192      // Character just arrived at destination\n   288\u2192      if (wasWalking && char.action === 'idle') {\n   289\u2192        if (char.targetObjectId) {\n   290\u2192          const obj = this.objectEngine.get(char.targetObjectId);\n   291\u2192          if (obj) {\n   292\u2192            this._doInteraction(char, obj, char.pendingAction || 'use');\n   293\u2192          } else {\n   294\u2192            char.targetObjectId = null;\n   295\u2192          }\n   296\u2192          char.pendingAction = 'use';\n   297\u2192        } else if (char.targetCharId) {\n   298\u2192          // Character arrived near another character for conversation \u2014 face each other\n   299\u2192          const target = this.characters.find(c => c.id === char.targetCharId);\n   300\u2192          if (target) {\n   301\u2192            char._updateFacing(target.tx - char.tx, target.ty - char.ty);\n   302\u2192            target._updateFacing(char.tx - target.tx, char.ty - target.ty);\n   303\u2192          }\n   304\u2192          char.targetCharId = null;\n   305\u2192        }\n   306\u2192      }\n   307\u2192    }\n   308\u2192  }\n   309\u2192\n   310\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Object \u2192 interaction animation mapping \u2500\u2500\n   311\u2192  // Maps object ID substrings to the animation played during interaction.\n   312\u2192  static _getInteractAnim(objectId) {\n   313\u2192    if (!objectId) return null;\n   314\u2192    if (objectId.includes('book') || objectId.includes('desk') || objectId.includes('bookshelf')) {\n   315\u2192      return 'reading';\n   316\u2192    }\n   317\u2192    if (objectId.includes('bed') || objectId.includes('kotatsu') || objectId.includes('sofa') || objectId.includes('tv')) {\n   318\u2192      return 'sit';\n   319\u2192    }\n   320\u2192    // phone / general interaction fallback for everything else\n   321\u2192    return 'phone';\n   322\u2192  }\n   323\u2192\n   324\u2192  _doInteraction(char, obj, action = 'use') {\n   325\u2192    // Face toward the object\n   326\u2192    const objCx = obj.position.tx + (obj.position.tw || 1) / 2;\n   327\u2192    const objCy = obj.position.ty + (obj.position.th || 1) / 2;\n   328\u2192    const dx = objCx - char.tx;\n   329\u2192    const dy = objCy - char.ty;\n   330\u2192    if (Math.abs(dx) >= Math.abs(dy)) {\n   331\u2192      char._updateFacing(dx, 0);\n   332\u2192    } else {\n   333\u2192      char._updateFacing(0, dy);\n   334\u2192    }\n   335\u2192\n   336\u2192    const event = this.objectEngine.interact(obj.id, action);\n   337\u2192    if (event) {\n   338\u2192      const anim = SimulationEngine._getInteractAnim(obj.id);\n   339\u2192      char.startInteraction(obj.id, anim);\n   340\u2192\n   341\u2192      // Successful interaction \u2192 happy (unless already upset)\n   342\u2192      if (char.mood !== 'upset') {\n   343\u2192        char.setMood('happy', 5000);\n   344\u2192      }\n   345\u2192\n   346\u2192      this._emit('character:interact', {\n   347\u2192        characterId: char.id, characterName: char.name,\n   348\u2192        objectId: obj.id, objectName: event.objectName,\n   349\u2192        from: event.from, to: event.to,\n   350\u2192        produces: event.produces || null,\n   351\u2192        emoji: event.emoji || null,\n   352\u2192      });\n   353\u2192    } else {\n   354\u2192      char.targetObjectId = null;\n   355\u2192    }\n   356\u2192  }\n   357\u2192\n   358\u2192  _getPriorityTarget(char) {\n   359\u2192    // Sol: pick up book if closed and nearby\n   360\u2192    if (char.id === 'sol') {\n   361\u2192      const book = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_book');\n   362\u2192      if (book && book.state === 'closed') {\n   363\u2192        const dist = Math.abs(book.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(book.position.ty - char.ty);\n   364\u2192        if (dist <= 6) {\n   365\u2192          return { obj: book, action: 'use' };\n   366\u2192        }\n   367\u2192      }\n   368\u2192    }\n   369\u2192\n   370\u2192    // Non-Maple near stocked display \u2192 take pastry\n   371\u2192    if (char.id !== 'maple') {\n   372\u2192      const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');\n   373\u2192      if (display && display.state === 'stocked') {\n   374\u2192        const dist = Math.abs(display.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(display.position.ty - char.ty);\n   375\u2192        if (dist <= 8) {\n   376\u2192          return { obj: display, action: 'use' };\n   377\u2192        }\n   378\u2192      }\n   379\u2192    }\n   380\u2192\n   381\u2192    // Maple: restock empty display case\n   382\u2192    if (char.id === 'maple') {\n   383\u2192      const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');\n   384\u2192      if (display && display.state === 'empty') {\n   385\u2192        return { obj: display, action: 'use' };\n   386\u2192      }\n   387\u2192    }\n   388\u2192\n   389\u2192    return null;\n   390\u2192  }\n   391\u2192\n   392\u2192  _pickWanderTarget(char) {\n   393\u2192    const allObjects = this.objectEngine.getAll();\n   394\u2192\n   395\u2192    // 60% home sector, 40% any sector\n   396\u2192    let candidates;\n   397\u2192    if (Math.random() < 0.6) {\n   398\u2192      candidates = allObjects.filter(o => o.sector === char.homeSector);\n   399\u2192      if (candidates.length === 0) candidates = allObjects;\n   400\u2192    } else {\n   401\u2192      candidates = allObjects;\n   402\u2192    }\n   403\u2192\n   404\u2192    // Avoid repeating last interaction\n   405\u2192    if (char.lastObjectId && candidates.length > 1) {\n   406\u2192      candidates = candidates.filter(o => o.id !== char.lastObjectId);\n   407\u2192    }\n   408\u2192\n   409\u2192    if (candidates.length === 0) return null;\n   410\u2192    return candidates[Math.floor(Math.random() * candidates.length)];\n   411\u2192  }\n   412\u2192\n   413\u2192  _reactToObjectEvent(event) {\n   414\u2192    // Espresso done \u2192 Maple happy\n   415\u2192    if (event.objectId === 'cafe_espresso' && event.to === 'done') {\n   416\u2192      const maple = this.characters.find(c => c.id === 'maple');\n   417\u2192      if (maple) maple.setMood('happy', 10000);\n   418\u2192    }\n   419\u2192\n   420\u2192    // Easel finished \u2192 Nyx happy\n   421\u2192    if (event.objectId === 'apt_easel' && event.to === 'finished') {\n   422\u2192      const nyx = this.characters.find(c => c.id === 'nyx');\n   423\u2192      if (nyx) nyx.setMood('happy', 20000);\n   424\u2192    }\n   425\u2192\n   426\u2192    // Display restocked \u2192 nearby characters happy\n   427\u2192    if (event.objectId === 'cafe_display' && event.to === 'stocked') {\n   428\u2192      for (const char of this.characters) {\n   429\u2192        const display = this.objectEngine.get('cafe_display');\n   430\u2192        if (display) {\n   431\u2192          const dist = Math.abs(display.position.tx - char.tx) + Math.abs(display.position.ty - char.ty);\n   432\u2192          if (dist <= 6) char.setMood('happy', 10000);\n   433\u2192        }\n   434\u2192      }\n   435\u2192    }\n   436\u2192  }\n   437\u2192\n   438\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Internal loop \u2500\u2500\n   439\u2192\n   440\u2192  _loop() {\n   441\u2192    if (!this.running) return;\n   442\u2192\n   443\u2192    this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame((timestamp) => {\n   444\u2192      if (!this.running) return;\n   445\u2192\n   446\u2192      if (!this.paused) {\n   447\u2192        const rawDelta = timestamp - this._lastTimestamp;\n   448\u2192        const delta = Math.min(rawDelta, 500) * this.timeScale; // cap delta, apply scale\n   449\u2192\n   450\u2192        this._accumulator += delta;\n   451\u2192\n   452\u2192        // Process full ticks\n   453\u2192        while (this._accumulator >= this.tickIntervalMs) {\n   454\u2192          this._accumulator -= this.tickIntervalMs;\n   455\u2192          const tickEvents = this.objectEngine.tick(this.tickIntervalMs);\n   456\u2192          this.tickCount++;\n   457\u2192          this.elapsedMs += this.tickIntervalMs;\n   458\u2192\n   459\u2192          this._wanderTick();\n   460\u2192\n   461\u2192          this._emit('engine:tick', {\n   462\u2192            tickCount: this.tickCount,\n   463\u2192            elapsedMs: this.elapsedMs,\n   464\u2192            events: tickEvents,\n   465\u2192          });\n   466\u2192        }\n   467\u2192\n   468\u2192        // Smooth character movement each frame\n   469\u2192        this._updateCharacters(delta);\n   470\u2192      }\n   471\u2192\n   472\u2192      this._lastTimestamp = timestamp;\n   473\u2192      this._loop();\n   474\u2192    });\n   475\u2192  }\n   476\u2192}\n   477\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
  }
}

     4→//
     5→// World tree: World → Sector → Arena → Object
     6→// Each object is a JSON state machine definition.

    10→// GROUND FLOOR (rows 10-20): Maple's café

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #41
Now I can see the full picture. Let me identify the bug: In `engine.js` at line 453-466, there's a game loop that processes ticks and then calls `_updateCharacters(delta)` at line 469. The bug is in the walk animation update in `characters.js` lines 201-206: ```javascript // Walk animation cycle (4 frames) this.walkTimer += deltaMs; if (this.walkTimer >= this.walkFrameMs) { this.walkTimer -= this.walkFrameMs; this.walkFrame = (this.walkFrame + 1) % 4; } ``` This only advances one frame per update call. When `deltaMs` is large enough to span multiple frame intervals—like 450ms when `walkFrameMs` is 200ms—the animation only progresses one frame instead of two, making it appear sluggish or frozen. The fix is to replace the `if` statement with a `while` loop so it can catch up and advance multiple frames in a single update when needed. Now I'm wondering if this alone explains the stuttering. Looking at the engine, `_updateCharacters` gets called every frame with actual delta time capped at 500ms, and with the character moving at 2.0 tiles/second, each tile takes 500ms to cross. The walk cycle is 800ms total, so a single tile only covers about 0.625 of the animation cycle. The real problem is that `if` statement—when a frame delta exceeds 200ms, it should advance multiple frames but only advances one. Let me trace through what happens at 60fps: the walk timer accumulates 16ms per frame, and after about 12 frames it hits 192ms, then on frame 13 it crosses 200ms and advances. That's pretty regular, so no freeze there. But what if there's a frame spike? With a 450ms spike, an `if` statement would advance once immediately, then advance again on the very next frame—creating a brief stutter effect. A `while` loop, on the other hand, would catch both advances in that same frame, consuming the full 450ms surplus at once and leaving the timer at 50ms. So the fix is switching from `if` to `while` for the walk animation timer. But I should check if there are other issues causing the stutter. Looking at the problem description again—"stutters or freezes partway through movement"—I'm wondering if the real culprit is something else. What if the character is mid-tile during interpolation and `_wanderTick()` fires, calling `moveTo()` again while movement is already in progress? Let me trace through the tick accumulator logic... Examining the tick loop... Actually, `_wanderTick()` only calls `moveTo()` when the character is idle, so it won't interrupt an active walk. That's safe. Let me dig deeper into what's actually causing the stutter. The real problem might be the interaction between the 500ms delta cap and the `if` statement in the walk timer logic. When a frame spike hits 500ms, the character can cross an entire tile in one frame, but the walk timer only advances once instead of twice, spreading that movement across two frames instead of handling it in one. This creates a two-step advance over consecutive frames rather than the correct simultaneous double-advance, which could look choppy. Let me trace through the animation update logic more carefully... Examining walk timer logic... I'm realizing there's a bug when delta is capped at 500ms during very low framerates—the walkTimer accumulates faster than it should advance frames, causing the animation to fall behind. Let me trace through this more carefully: at 1fps with a 500ms cap, each frame adds 500ms to the timer, but we only subtract 200ms per animation frame, so the timer keeps growing unboundedly instead of staying in sync. So the animation actually runs faster than intended at low frame rates because the timer grows unbounded while the frame still advances every frame—but at 10fps, the frame advances roughly every other frame, which means the animation speed stays closer to real-time than I initially thought. At 3fps though, the timer balloons by 133ms per frame, causing the animation to speed up dramatically. The `while` loop fixes this by advancing the frame multiple times in a single update when the timer exceeds the threshold, keeping the animation speed consistent regardless of frame rate. So the animation would speed up dramatically after a low-FPS period, cycling through frames every refresh instead of every 200ms—that's the actual bug, not a freeze. Let me look back at the original issue and the renderer code to see what's really happening. I'm checking whether the walkFrame index might go out of bounds or if missing sprite assets like `walk3` or `walk4` could cause the animation to stall at certain frames. That would explain the freeze, though it'd be an asset problem rather than a logic issue. Let me trace through the git history to see what changed recently and might have triggered this.
▶ VIEW RAW DATA 
{
  "content": {
    "type": "thinking",
    "thinking": "Now I can see the full picture. Let me identify the bug:\n\nIn `engine.js` at line 453-466, there's a game loop that processes ticks and then calls `_updateCharacters(delta)` at line 469.\n\nThe bug is in the walk animation update in `characters.js` lines 201-206:\n\n```javascript\n// Walk animation cycle (4 frames)\nthis.walkTimer += deltaMs;\nif (this.walkTimer >= this.walkFrameMs) {\n  this.walkTimer -= this.walkFrameMs;\n  this.walkFrame = (this.walkFrame + 1) % 4;\n\n\n}\n```\n\nThis only advances one frame per update call. When `deltaMs` is large enough to span multiple frame intervals\u2014like 450ms when `walkFrameMs` is 200ms\u2014the animation only progresses one frame instead of two, making it appear sluggish or frozen. The fix is to replace the `if` statement with a `while` loop so it can catch up and advance multiple frames in a single update when needed.\n\nNow I'm wondering if this alone explains the stuttering. Looking at the engine, `_updateCharacters` gets called every frame with actual delta time capped at 500ms, and with the character moving at 2.0 tiles/second, each tile takes 500ms to cross. The walk cycle is 800ms total, so a single tile only covers about 0.625 of the animation cycle. The real problem is that `if` statement\u2014when a frame delta exceeds 200ms, it should advance multiple frames but only advances one.\n\nLet me trace through what happens at 60fps: the walk timer accumulates 16ms per frame, and after about 12 frames it hits 192ms, then on frame 13 it crosses 200ms and advances. That's pretty regular, so no freeze there. But what if there's a frame spike?\n\nWith a 450ms spike, an `if` statement would advance once immediately, then advance again on the very next frame\u2014creating a brief stutter effect. A `while` loop, on the other hand, would catch both advances in that same frame, consuming the full 450ms surplus at once and leaving the timer at 50ms.\n\nSo the fix is switching from `if` to `while` for the walk animation timer. But I should check if there are other issues causing the stutter. Looking at the problem description again\u2014\"stutters or freezes partway through movement\"\u2014I'm wondering if the real culprit is something else. What if the character is mid-tile during interpolation and `_wanderTick()` fires, calling `moveTo()` again while movement is already in progress? Let me trace through the tick accumulator logic...\n\nExamining the tick loop...\n\nActually, `_wanderTick()` only calls `moveTo()` when the character is idle, so it won't interrupt an active walk. That's safe. Let me dig deeper into what's actually causing the stutter.\n\nThe real problem might be the interaction between the 500ms delta cap and the `if` statement in the walk timer logic. When a frame spike hits 500ms, the character can cross an entire tile in one frame, but the walk timer only advances once instead of twice, spreading that movement across two frames instead of handling it in one. This creates a two-step advance over consecutive frames rather than the correct simultaneous double-advance, which could look choppy.\n\nLet me trace through the animation update logic more carefully...\n\nExamining walk timer logic... I'm realizing there's a bug when delta is capped at 500ms during very low framerates\u2014the walkTimer accumulates faster than it should advance frames, causing the animation to fall behind. Let me trace through this more carefully: at 1fps with a 500ms cap, each frame adds 500ms to the timer, but we only subtract 200ms per animation frame, so the timer keeps growing unboundedly instead of staying in sync. So the animation actually runs faster than intended at low frame rates because the timer grows unbounded while the frame still advances every frame\u2014but at 10fps, the frame advances roughly every other frame, which means the animation speed stays closer to real-time than I initially thought.\n\nAt 3fps though, the timer balloons by 133ms per frame, causing the animation to speed up dramatically. The `while` loop fixes this by advancing the frame multiple times in a single update when the timer exceeds the threshold, keeping the animation speed consistent regardless of frame rate. So the animation would speed up dramatically after a low-FPS period, cycling through frames every refresh instead of every 200ms\u2014that's the actual bug, not a freeze. Let me look back at the original issue and the renderer code to see what's really happening.\n\nI'm checking whether the walkFrame index might go out of bounds or if missing sprite assets like `walk3` or `walk4` could cause the animation to stall at certain frames. That would explain the freeze, though it'd be an asset problem rather than a logic issue. Let me trace through the git history to see what changed recently and might have triggered this.",

     1→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     2→// Canvas Renderer — Tilemap, Objects, Characters, Particles, UI
     3→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     4→//
     5→// Native resolution: 768×1152 (16×24 tiles at 48px).
     6→// CSS-scaled to fill window while maintaining aspect ratio.
     7→// imageSmoothingEnabled = false for crisp pixel art.
     8→
     9→import { TILE_SIZE, MAP_COLS, MAP_ROWS, MAP_W, MAP_H, MAP, TILE_COLORS, TILE_SPRITES, T, PROP_SPRITES, PROPS } from './tilemap.js';
    10→
    11→// ── Object visual → sprite path mapping (Café) ──
    12→const OBJECT_SPRITE_PATHS = {
    13→  // Espresso machine
    14→  espresso_idle:       'assets/cafe/objects/espresso_machine.png',

    23→  stove_on:            'assets/cafe/objects/stove_on.png',
    24→  stove_done:          'assets/cafe/objects/stove_on.png',

    27→  easel_painting:      'assets/cafe/objects/easel_painting.png',
    28→  easel_finished:      'assets/cafe/objects/easel_finished.png',
    29→  // Book
    30→  book_closed:         'assets/cafe/objects/book_closed.png',
    31→  book_open:           'assets/cafe/objects/book_open.png',
    32→  // Other objects
