62\u2192  sol_sit:       'assets/characters/sol_sit.png',\n    63\u2192  sol_phone:     'assets/characters/sol_phone.png',\n    64\u2192  nyx_idle:      'assets/characters/nyx_idle.png',\n    65\u2192  nyx_walk1:     'assets/characters/nyx_walk1.png',\n    66\u2192  nyx_walk2:     'assets/characters/nyx_walk2.png',\n    67\u2192  nyx_walk3:     'assets/characters/nyx_walk3.png',\n    68\u2192  nyx_walk4:     'assets/characters/nyx_walk4.png',\n    69\u2192  nyx_reading:   'assets/characters/nyx_reading.png',\n    70\u2192  nyx_sit:       'assets/characters/nyx_sit.png',\n    71\u2192  nyx_phone:     'assets/characters/nyx_phone.png',\n    72\u2192};\n    73\u2192\n    74\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Object visual colors (fallback when sprites not loaded) \u2500\u2500\n    75\u2192const OBJECT_COLORS = {\n    76\u2192  // Caf\u00e9 objects\n    77\u2192  espresso_idle:    '#606065',\n    78\u2192  espresso_brewing: '#707075',\n    79\u2192  espresso_done:    '#8b6030',\n    80\u2192  coffee_maker:     '#a0a0a5',\n    81\u2192  display_empty:    '#6a6a8a',\n    82\u2192  display_stocked:  '#8a7a5a',\n    83\u2192  display_partial:  '#7a6a4a',\n    84\u2192  cash_register:    '#a0a0a5',\n    85\u2192  sink:             '#8090a0',\n    86\u2192  book_closed:      '#a04040',\n    87\u2192  book_open:        '#e8e0d0',\n    88\u2192  // Apartment objects\n    89\u2192  stove_off:        '#404045',\n    90\u2192  stove_on:         '#605040',\n    91\u2192  stove_done:       '#605040',\n    92\u2192  fridge:           '#d0d0d5',\n    93\u2192  easel_blank:      '#a09080',\n    94\u2192  easel_painting:   '#7060a0',\n    95\u2192  easel_finished:   '#60a0d0',\n    96\u2192  bed:              '#c0b8d0',\n    97\u2192  desk:             '#8b6539',\n    98\u2192  // Small items\n    99\u2192  cup_empty:        '#e0dcd0',\n   100\u2192  cup_full:         '#8b6030',\n   101\u2192  plate_empty:      '#e0dcd0',\n   102\u2192  plate_food:       '#c0a060',\n   103\u2192  pastry:           '#d0b470',\n   104\u2192};\n   105\u2192\n   106\u2192// Fallback color for unknown visuals\n   107\u2192const DEFAULT_OBJ_COLOR = '#ff00ff';\n   108\u2192\n   109\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Particle definitions \u2500\u2500\n   110\u2192const PARTICLE_DEFS = {\n   111\u2192  small_steam:  { color: '#cccccc', size: 2, count: 3, speed: 0.3, life: 800, wobble: true },\n   112\u2192  steam:        { color: '#dddddd', size: 3, count: 5, speed: 0.4, life: 1000, wobble: true },\n   113\u2192  dark_smoke:   { color: '#444444', size: 4, count: 6, speed: 0.3, life: 1200, wobble: true },\n   114\u2192  sparkle:      { color: '#ffee44', size: 2, count: 4, speed: 0.2, life: 600, shape: 'square' },\n   115\u2192  interact_sparkle: { color: '#ffffff', size: 1.5, count: 2, speed: 0.5, life: 400, shape: 'square' },\n   116\u2192  // Object-specific interaction particles\n   117\u2192  oven_embers:    { colors: ['#ff6820', '#ff4400', '#ffaa30'], size: 2, count: 4, speed: 0.4, life: 700, wobble: true },\n   118\u2192  dirt_toss:      { colors: ['#8B6914', '#6B4F12', '#A07828'], size: 1.5, count: 5, speed: 0.3, life: 500 },\n   119\u2192  water_drops:    { colors: ['#4488dd', '#66aaff', '#3366bb'], size: 1.5, count: 3, speed: 0.4, life: 600, dir: 'down' },\n   120\u2192  paint_splatter: { colors: ['#ff4488', '#44aaff', '#ffdd44', '#44dd88', '#aa44ff'], size: 2, count: 5, speed: 0.6, life: 500, dir: 'radial' },\n   121\u2192  paper_flutter:  { colors: ['#f0e8d0', '#e8dcc0', '#fff8e8'], size: 2, count: 3, speed: 0.15, life: 900, wobble: true, shape: 'square' },\n   122\u2192};\n   123\u2192\n   124\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Object ID \u2192 interaction particle type \u2500\u2500\n   125\u2192function getInteractParticleType(char) {\n   126\u2192  const id = char.targetObjectId;\n   127\u2192  if (!id) return 'interact_sparkle';\n   128\u2192  if (id.includes('espresso') || id.includes('coffee')) return 'steam';\n   129\u2192  if (id.includes('stove')) return 'oven_embers';\n   130\u2192  if (id.includes('sink')) return 'water_drops';\n   131\u2192  if (id.includes('easel')) return 'paint_splatter';\n   132\u2192  if (id.includes('book')) return 'paper_flutter';\n   133\u2192  return 'interact_sparkle';\n   134\u2192}\n   135\u2192\n   136\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Sprite preloader \u2500\u2500\n   137\u2192function loadImage(src) {\n   138\u2192  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {\n   139\u2192    const img = new Image();\n   140\u2192    img.onload = () => resolve(img);\n   141\u2192    img.onerror = () => reject(new Error(`Failed to load: ${src}`));\n   142\u2192    img.src = src;\n   143\u2192  });\n   144\u2192}\n   145\u2192\n   146\u2192/**\n   147\u2192 * Preload all tile, object, and character sprites.\n   148\u2192 * Returns { tiles: Map, objects: Map, characters: Map }\n   149\u2192 * Failed loads are silently skipped (renderer falls back to colored rects).\n   150\u2192 */\n   151\u2192export async function preloadSprites() {\n   152\u2192  const tiles = new Map();\n   153\u2192  const objects = new Map();\n   154\u2192  const characters = new Map();\n   155\u2192  const props = new Map();\n   156\u2192\n   157\u2192  const promises = [];\n   158\u2192\n   159\u2192  // Tile sprites\n   160\u2192  for (const [tileId, path] of Object.entries(TILE_SPRITES)) {\n   161\u2192    promises.push(\n   162\u2192      loadImage(path)\n   163\u2192        .then(img => tiles.set(Number(tileId), img))\n   164\u2192        .catch(() => { /* fallback to color */ })\n   165\u2192    );\n   166\u2192  }\n   167\u2192\n   168\u2192  // Object sprites\n   169\u2192  for (const [visual, path] of Object.entries(OBJECT_SPRITE_PATHS)) {\n   170\u2192    promises.push(\n   171\u2192      loadImage(path)\n   172\u2192        .then(img => objects.set(visual, img))\n   173\u2192        .catch(() => { /* fallback to color */ })\n   174\u2192    );\n   175\u2192  }\n   176\u2192\n   177\u2192  // Character sprites\n   178\u2192  for (const [key, path] of Object.entries(CHARACTER_SPRITE_PATHS)) {\n   179\u2192    promises.push(\n   180\u2192      loadImage(path)\n   181\u2192        .then(img => characters.set(key, img))\n   182\u2192        .catch(() => { /* fallback to color */ })\n   183\u2192    );\n   184\u2192  }\n   185\u2192\n   186\u2192  // Prop sprites\n   187\u2192  for (const [key, path] of Object.entries(PROP_SPRITES)) {\n   188\u2192    promises.push(\n   189\u2192      loadImage(path)\n   190\u2192        .then(img => props.set(key, img))\n   191\u2192        .catch(() => { /* fallback \u2014 props just won't render */ })\n   192\u2192    );\n   193\u2192  }\n   194\u2192\n   195\u2192  await Promise.all(promises);\n   196\u2192  return { tiles, objects, characters, props };\n   197\u2192}\n   198\u2192\n   199\u2192export class Renderer {\n   200\u2192  constructor(container) {\n   201\u2192    this.canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n   202\u2192    this.canvas.width = MAP_W;\n   203\u2192    this.canvas.height = MAP_H;\n   204\u2192    this.ctx = this.canvas.getContext('2d');\n   205\u2192    this.ctx.imageSmoothingEnabled = false;\n   206\u2192\n   207\u2192    // CSS scaling \u2014 fill window, keep aspect ratio\n   208\u2192    this.canvas.style.display = 'block';\n   209\u2192    this.canvas.style.imageRendering = 'pixelated';\n   210\u2192\n   211\u2192    // High-res text overlay canvas (renders at display resolution for crisp text)\n   212\u2192    this.textCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n   213\u2192    this.textCanvas.style.position = 'absolute';\n   214\u2192    this.textCanvas.style.top = '0';\n   215\u2192    this.textCanvas.style.left = '0';\n   216\u2192    this.textCanvas.style.pointerEvents = 'none';\n   217\u2192    this.textCtx = this.textCanvas.getContext('2d');\n   218\u2192\n   219\u2192    this._resize();\n   220\u2192    window.addEventListener('resize', () => this._resize());\n   221\u2192\n   222\u2192    container.appendChild(this.canvas);\n   223\u2192    container.appendChild(this.textCanvas);\n   224\u2192\n   225\u2192    // Sprite caches (populated by setSprites)\n   226\u2192    this.tileSprites = null;      // Map<tileId, Image>\n   227\u2192    this.objectSprites = null;    // Map<visualKey, Image>\n   228\u2192    this.characterSprites = null; // Map<spriteKey, Image>\n   229\u2192\n   230\u2192    // Pre-rendered tilemap (offscreen canvas, re-drawn only when sprites load)\n   231\u2192    this._tilemapCache = null;\n   232\u2192\n   233\u2192    // Particle state\n   234\u2192    this.particles = [];\n   235\u2192\n   236\u2192    // Emoji float state\n   237\u2192    this.emojiFloats = [];\n   238\u2192\n   239\u2192    // Speech bubble state\n   240\u2192    this.speechBubbles = [];\n   241\u2192\n   242\u2192    // Status bar text\n   243\u2192    this.statusText = '';\n   244\u2192\n   245\u2192    // Stars (lazy-initialized on first night render)\n   246\u2192    this._stars = null;\n   247\u2192\n   248\u2192    // Ambient particles (fireflies, leaves)\n   249\u2192    this._ambientParticles = [];\n   250\u2192    this._leafTimer = 0;\n   251\u2192    this._waterTiles = null;\n   252\u2192    this._windowTiles = null;\n   253\u2192    this._lanternPositions = null;\n   254\u2192\n   255\u2192    // Animation\n   256\u2192    this._rafId = null;\n   257\u2192    this._lastTime = 0;\n   258\u2192    this._renderCallback = null;\n   259\u2192  }\n   260\u2192\n   261\u2192  /** Assign preloaded sprites and bake the tilemap cache. */\n   262\u2192  setSprites(sprites) {\n   263\u2192    this.tileSprites = sprites.tiles;\n   264\u2192    this.objectSprites = sprites.objects;\n   265\u2192    this.characterSprites = sprites.characters;\n   266\u2192    this.propSprites = sprites.props || null;\n   267\u2192    this._bakeTilemapCache();\n   268\u2192  }\n   269\u2192\n   270\u2192  /** Pre-render tilemap to an offscreen canvas for fast blitting. */\n   271\u2192  _bakeTilemapCache() {\n   272\u2192    const offscreen = document.createElement('canvas');\n   273\u2192    offscreen.width = MAP_W;\n   274\u2192    offscreen.height = MAP_H;\n   275\u2192    const octx = offscreen.getContext('2d');\n   276\u2192    octx.imageSmoothingEnabled = false;\n   277\u2192\n   278\u2192    // Fill with base grass color so no transparency bleeds through\n   279\u2192    octx.fillStyle = '#d4c5a9'; // caf\u00e9 tile floor base\n   280\u2192    octx.fillRect(0, 0, MAP_W, MAP_H);\n   281\u2192\n   282\u2192    for (let row = 0; row < MAP_ROWS; row++) {\n   283\u2192      for (let col = 0; col < MAP_COLS; col++) {\n   284\u2192        const tile = MAP[row][col];\n   285\u2192        const x = col * TILE_SIZE;\n   286\u2192        const y = row * TILE_SIZE;\n   287\u2192\n   288\u2192        const sprite = this.tileSprites && this.tileSprites.get(tile);\n   289\u2192        if (sprite) {\n   290\u2192          octx.drawImage(sprite, x, y, TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);\n   291\u2192        } else {\n   292\u2192          octx.fillStyle = TILE_COLORS[tile] || '#ff00ff';\n   293\u2192          octx.fillRect(x, y, TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);\n   294\u2192        }\n   295\u2192      }\n   296\u2192    }\n   297\u2192\n   298\u2192    // Bake decorative props on top of tiles (static, never change)\n   299\u2192    for (const prop of PROPS) {\n   300\u2192      const sprite = this.propSprites && this.propSprites.get(prop.type);\n   301\u2192      if (sprite) {\n   302\u2192        const pw = (prop.tw || 1) * TILE_SIZE;\n   303\u2192        const ph = (prop.th || 1) * TILE_SIZE;\n   304\u2192        octx.drawImage(sprite, prop.tx * TILE_SIZE, prop.ty * TILE_SIZE, pw, ph);\n   305\u2192      }\n   306\u2192    }\n   307\u2192\n   308\u2192    this._tilemapCache = offscreen;\n   309\u2192  }\n   310\u2192\n   311\u2192  _resize() {\n   312\u2192    const aspect = MAP_W / MAP_H;\n   313\u2192    const winW = window.innerWidth;\n   314\u2192    const winH = window.innerHeight;\n   315\u2192    const winAspect = winW / winH;\n   316\u2192\n   317\u2192    let cssW, cssH;\n   318\u2192    if (winAspect > aspect) {\n   319\u2192      cssH = winH;\n   320\u2192      cssW = winH * aspect;\n   321\u2192    } else {\n   322\u2192      cssW = winW;\n   323\u2192      cssH = winW / aspect;\n   324\u2192    }\n   325\u2192\n   326\u2192    this.canvas.style.width = cssW + 'px';\n   327\u2192    this.canvas.style.height = cssH + 'px';\n   328\u2192    this.canvas.style.margin = 'auto';\n   329\u2192\n   330\u2192    this.cssScale = cssW / MAP_W;\n   331\u2192    this.cssOffsetX = (winW - cssW) / 2;\n   332\u2192    this.cssOffsetY = (winH - cssH) / 2;\n   333\u2192\n   334\u2192    // Resize text overlay to match display resolution\n   335\u2192    if (this.textCanvas) {\n   336\u2192      const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;\n   337\u2192      this.textCanvas.style.width = cssW + 'px';\n   338\u2192      this.textCanvas.style.height = cssH + 'px';\n   339\u2192      this.textCanvas.width = Math.round(cssW * dpr);\n   340\u2192      this.textCanvas.height = Math.round(cssH * dpr);\n   341\u2192      this.textScale = this.textCanvas.width / MAP_W;\n   342\u2192    }\n   343\u2192  }\n   344\u2192\n   345\u2192  // Convert page click coords to tile coords\n   346\u2192  pageToTile(pageX, pageY) {\n   347\u2192    const rect = this.canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n   348\u2192    const canvasX = (pageX - rect.left) / this.cssScale;\n   349\u2192    const canvasY = (pageY - rect.top) / this.cssScale;\n   350\u2192    return {\n   351\u2192      tx: Math.floor(canvasX / TILE_SIZE),\n   352\u2192      ty: Math.floor(canvasY / TILE_SIZE),\n   353\u2192      px: canvasX,\n   354\u2192      py: canvasY,\n   355\u2192    };\n   356\u2192  }\n   357\u2192\n   358\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Tilemap \u2500\u2500\n   359\u2192  renderTilemap() {\n   360\u2192    if (this._tilemapCache) {\n   361\u2192      this.ctx.drawImage(this._tilemapCache, 0, 0);\n   362\u2192    } else {\n   363\u2192      // Fallback: draw colored rectangles (no sprites loaded yet)\n   364\u2192      const ctx = this.ctx;\n   365\u2192      for (let row = 0; row < MAP_ROWS; row++) {\n   366\u2192        for (let col = 0; col < MAP_COLS; col++) {\n   367\u2192          const tile = MAP[row][col];\n   368\u2192          ctx.fillStyle = TILE_COLORS[tile] || '#ff00ff';\n   369\u2192          ctx.fillRect(col * TILE_SIZE, row * TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);\n   370\u2192        }\n   371\u2192      }\n   372\u2192    }\n   373\u2192  }\n   374\u2192\n   375\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Objects \u2500\u2500\n   376\u2192  renderObjects(objects) {\n   377\u2192    const ctx = this.ctx;\n   378\u2192\n   379\u2192    for (const obj of objects) {\n   380\u2192      const tx = obj.position.tx;\n   381\u2192      const ty = obj.position.ty;\n   382\u2192      const pxX = tx * TILE_SIZE;\n   383\u2192      const pxY = ty * TILE_SIZE;\n   384\u2192      const w = (obj.position.tw || 1) * TILE_SIZE;\n   385\u2192      const h = (obj.position.th || 1) * TILE_SIZE;\n   386\u2192\n   387\u2192      const sprite = this.objectSprites && this.objectSprites.get(obj.visual);\n   388\u2192\n   389\u2192      if (sprite) {\n   390\u2192        // Draw sprite scaled to object tile size\n   391\u2192        ctx.drawImage(sprite, pxX, pxY, w, h);\n   392\u2192      } else {\n   393\u2192        // Fallback: colored rectangle\n   394\u2192        const color = OBJECT_COLORS[obj.visual] || DEFAULT_OBJ_COLOR;\n   395\u2192        ctx.fillStyle = color;\n   396\u2192        ctx.fillRect(pxX + 1, pxY + 1, w - 2, h - 2);\n   397\u2192        ctx.strokeStyle = '#000000';\n   398\u2192        ctx.lineWidth = 1;\n   399\u2192        ctx.strokeRect(pxX + 0.5, pxY + 0.5, w - 1, h - 1);\n   400\u2192      }\n   401\u2192\n   402\u2192      // Oven flash on interaction (bright overlay for first 200ms)\n   403\u2192      if (this._activeInteractions?.has(obj.id) && (obj.id.includes('stove') || obj.id.includes('espresso'))) {\n   404\u2192        const elapsed = this._activeInteractions.get(obj.id);\n   405\u2192        if (elapsed < 200) {\n   406\u2192          ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${0.2 * (1 - elapsed / 200)})`;\n   407\u2192          ctx.fillRect(pxX, pxY, w, h);\n   408\u2192        }\n   409\u2192      }\n   410\u2192\n   411\u2192      // Spawn particles if object has them\n   412\u2192      if (obj.particles && PARTICLE_DEFS[obj.particles]) {\n   413\u2192        this._maybeSpawnParticles(obj.particles, pxX + w / 2, pxY);\n   414\u2192      }\n   415\u2192    }\n   416\u2192  }\n   417\u2192\n   418\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Characters \u2500\u2500\n   419\u2192  renderCharacters(characters, debug = false) {\n   420\u2192    if (!characters || characters.length === 0) return;\n   421\u2192    const ctx = this.ctx;\n   422\u2192    const now = performance.now();\n   423\u2192\n   424\u2192    // Sort by py for depth ordering (lower = drawn on top)\n   425\u2192    const sorted = [...characters].sort((a, b) => a.py - b.py);\n   426\u2192\n   427\u2192    for (const char of sorted) {\n   428\u2192      const px = char.px;\n   429\u2192      // Idle bob: 1px vertical offset on ~800ms cycle (phase offset per character)\n   430\u2192      const idleBob = char.action !== 'walking'\n   431\u2192        ? (Math.sin(now * 0.008 + char.tx * 2) > 0 ? 1 : 0)\n   432\u2192        : 0;\n   433\u2192      const py = char.py + idleBob;\n   434\u2192      const sprite = this.characterSprites?.get(char.spriteKey);\n   435\u2192\n   436\u2192      // Bounce effect on interaction start (scale 1.1\u21921.0 over 100ms)\n   437\u2192      let bounceScale = 1;\n   438\u2192      if (char.action === 'interacting') {\n   439\u2192        const elapsed = 2000 - char.interactTimer;\n   440\u2192        if (elapsed >= 0 && elapsed < 100) {\n   441\u2192          bounceScale = 1 + 0.1 * (1 - elapsed / 100);\n   442\u2192        }\n   443\u2192      }\n   444\u2192\n   445\u2192      if (sprite) {\n   446\u2192        if (char.facing === 'left' || bounceScale !== 1) {\n   447\u2192          ctx.save();\n   448\u2192          const cx = px + TILE_SIZE / 2;\n   449\u2192          const cy = py + TILE_SIZE / 2;\n   450\u2192          ctx.translate(cx, cy);\n   451\u2192          if (bounceScale !== 1) ctx.scale(bounceScale, bounceScale);\n   452\u2192          if (char.facing === 'left') ctx.scale(-1, 1);\n   453\u2192          ctx.drawImage(sprite, -TILE_SIZE / 2, -TILE_SIZE / 2, TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);\n   454\u2192          ctx.restore();\n   455\u2192        } else {\n   456\u2192          ctx.drawImage(sprite, px, py, TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);\n   457\u2192        }\n   458\u2192      } else {\n   459\u2192        // Fallback: simple character shape\n   460\u2192        const cx = px + TILE_SIZE / 2;\n   461\u2192\n   462\u2192        // Body\n   463\u2192        ctx.fillStyle = char.colors?.outfit || '#888888';\n   464\u2192        ctx.fillRect(cx - 3, py + 6, 6, 8);\n   465\u2192\n   466\u2192        // Head\n   467\u2192        ctx.fillStyle = char.colors?.body || '#ddccbb';\n   468\u2192        ctx.beginPath();\n   469\u2192        ctx.arc(cx, py + 4, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n   470\u2192        ctx.fill();\n   471\u2192\n   472\u2192        // Hair\n   473\u2192        ctx.fillStyle = char.colors?.hair || '#443322';\n   474\u2192        ctx.beginPath();\n   475\u2192        ctx.arc(cx, py + 3, 3, Math.PI, Math.PI * 2);\n   476\u2192        ctx.fill();\n   477\u2192      }\n   478\u2192\n   479\u2192      // Object-specific interaction particles\n   480\u2192      if (char.action === 'interacting') {\n   481\u2192        const particleType = getInteractParticleType(char);\n   482\u2192        this._maybeSpawnParticles(particleType, px + TILE_SIZE / 2, py + TILE_SIZE / 2);\n   483\u2192      }\n   484\u2192    }\n   485\u2192  }\n   486\u2192\n   487\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Character labels on text overlay (mood emoji + names) \u2500\u2500\n   488\u2192  renderCharacterLabels(characters, debug = false) {\n   489\u2192    if (!characters || characters.length === 0) return;\n   490\u2192    const ctx = this.textCtx;\n   491\u2192    const s = this.textScale;\n   492\u2192\n   493\u2192    for (const char of characters) {\n   494\u2192      const px = char.px * s;\n   495\u2192      const py = char.py * s;\n   496\u2192      const tileS = TILE_SIZE * s;\n   497\u2192\n   498\u2192      // Mood emoji above character\n   499\u2192      if (char.moodEmoji) {\n   500\u2192        ctx.font = `${Math.round(8 * s)}px serif`;\n   501\u2192        ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n   502\u2192        ctx.fillText(char.moodEmoji, px + tileS / 2, py - 1 * s);\n   503\u2192      }\n   504\u2192\n   505\u2192      // Name label below sprite\n   506\u2192      const fontSize = Math.round(5 * s);\n   507\u2192      ctx.font = `${fontSize}px monospace`;\n   508\u2192      ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n   509\u2192      const nameX = px + tileS / 2;\n   510\u2192      const nameY = py + tileS + 6 * s;\n   511\u2192\n   512\u2192      const label = debug ? `${char.name} [${char.action}]` : char.name;\n   513\u2192      const metrics = ctx.measureText(label);\n   514\u2192      const labelW = metrics.width + 3 * s;\n   515\u2192\n   516\u2192      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.6)';\n   517\u2192      ctx.fillRect(nameX - labelW / 2, nameY - 5 * s, labelW, 7 * s);\n   518\u2192\n   519\u2192      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';\n   520\u2192      ctx.fillText(label, nameX, nameY);\n   521\u2192    }\n   522\u2192  }\n   523\u2192\n   524\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Object labels (debug overlay) \u2500\u2500\n   525\u2192  renderObjectLabels(objects) {\n   526\u2192    const ctx = this.textCtx;\n   527\u2192    const s = this.textScale;\n   528\u2192    const fontSize = Math.round(5 * s);\n   529\u2192    ctx.font = `${fontSize}px monospace`;\n   530\u2192    ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n   531\u2192\n   532\u2192    for (const obj of objects) {\n   533\u2192      const tx = obj.position.tx;\n   534\u2192      const ty = obj.position.ty;\n   535\u2192      const pxX = (tx * TILE_SIZE + ((obj.position.tw || 1) * TILE_SIZE) / 2) * s;\n   536\u2192      const pxY = (ty * TILE_SIZE - 2) * s;\n   537\u2192\n   538\u2192      const text = `${obj.name} [${obj.state}]`;\n   539\u2192      const metrics = ctx.measureText(text);\n   540\u2192      const textW = metrics.width + 4 * s;\n   541\u2192\n   542\u2192      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.7)';\n   543\u2192      ctx.fillRect(pxX - textW / 2, pxY - 5 * s, textW, 7 * s);\n   544\u2192\n   545\u2192      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';\n   546\u2192      ctx.fillText(text, pxX, pxY);\n   547\u2192\n   548\u2192      // Timer bar under object\n   549\u2192      if (obj.autoNextDuration !== null) {\n   550\u2192        const remaining = obj.timeRemainingMs;\n   551\u2192        const total = obj.autoNextDuration;\n   552\u2192        const pct = (total - remaining) / total;\n   553\u2192        const barW = ((obj.position.tw || 1) * TILE_SIZE - 4) * s;\n   554\u2192        const barY = ((ty + (obj.position.th || 1)) * TILE_SIZE + 1) * s;\n   555\u2192        const barX = (tx * TILE_SIZE + 2) * s;\n   556\u2192\n   557\u2192        ctx.fillStyle = '#333333';\n   558\u2192        ctx.fillRect(barX, barY, barW, 2 * s);\n   559\u2192        ctx.fillStyle = pct > 0.85 ? '#d04020' : pct > 0.66 ? '#d0a020' : '#40a040';\n   560\u2192        ctx.fillRect(barX, barY, barW * pct, 2 * s);\n   561\u2192      }\n   562\u2192    }\n   563\u2192  }\n   564\u2192\n   565\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Particles \u2500\u2500\n   566\u2192  _maybeSpawnParticles(type, x, y) {\n   567\u2192    const def = PARTICLE_DEFS[type];\n   568\u2192    if (!def) return;\n   569\u2192    const active = this.particles.filter(p => p.type === type).length;\n   570\u2192    if (active >= def.count * 2) return;\n   571\u2192\n   572\u2192    for (let i = 0; i < def.count; i++) {\n   573\u2192      const color = def.colors\n   574\u2192        ? def.colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * def.colors.length)]\n   575\u2192        : def.color;\n   576\u2192\n   577\u2192      let vx, vy;\n   578\u2192      if (def.dir === 'down') {\n   579\u2192        vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;\n   580\u2192        vy = def.speed + Math.random() * 0.2;\n   581\u2192      } else if (def.dir === 'radial') {\n   582\u2192        const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;\n   583\u2192        vx = Math.cos(angle) * def.speed;\n   584\u2192        vy = Math.sin(angle) * def.speed;\n   585\u2192      } else {\n   586\u2192        vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;\n   587\u2192        vy = -def.speed - Math.random() * 0.2;\n   588\u2192      }\n   589\u2192\n   590\u2192      this.particles.push({\n   591\u2192        type,\n   592\u2192        x: x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 8,\n   593\u2192        y: y,\n   594\u2192        vx,\n   595\u2192        vy,\n   596\u2192        life: def.life * (0.7 + Math.random() * 0.6),\n   597\u2192        maxLife: def.life,\n   598\u2192        color,\n   599\u2192        size: def.size,\n   600\u2192        shape: def.shape || 'circle',\n   601\u2192        wobble: def.wobble || false,\n   602\u2192        phase: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,\n   603\u2192        age: 0,\n   604\u2192      });\n   605\u2192    }\n   606\u2192  }\n   607\u2192\n   608\u2192  renderParticles(dt) {\n   609\u2192    const ctx = this.ctx;\n   610\u2192\n   611\u2192    for (let i = this.particles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n   612\u2192      const p = this.particles[i];\n   613\u2192      p.life -= dt;\n   614\u2192      if (p.life <= 0) {\n   615\u2192        this.particles.splice(i, 1);\n   616\u2192        continue;\n   617\u2192      }\n   618\u2192\n   619\u2192      p.x += p.vx;\n   620\u2192      p.y += p.vy;\n   621\u2192      p.age = (p.age || 0) + dt;\n   622\u2192\n   623\u2192      const alpha = Math.max(0, p.life / p.maxLife);\n   624\u2192      ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;\n   625\u2192      ctx.fillStyle = p.color;\n   626\u2192\n   627\u2192      // Sine wave wobble for steam/smoke\n   628\u2192      const drawX = p.wobble\n   629\u2192        ? p.x + Math.sin(p.age * 0.006 + (p.phase || 0)) * 1.5\n   630\u2192        : p.x;\n   631\u2192\n   632\u2192      if (p.shape === 'square') {\n   633\u2192        ctx.fillRect(drawX - p.size / 2, p.y - p.size / 2, p.size, p.size);\n   634\u2192      } else {\n   635\u2192        ctx.beginPath();\n   636\u2192        ctx.arc(drawX, p.y, p.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n   637\u2192        ctx.fill();\n   638\u2192      }\n   639\u2192    }\n   640\u2192\n   641\u2192    ctx.globalAlpha = 1;\n   642\u2192  }\n   643\u2192\n   644\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Speech Bubble \u2500\u2500\n   645\u2192  addSpeechBubble(tx, ty, text, durationMs = 3000) {\n   646\u2192    this.speechBubbles.push({\n   647\u2192      x: tx * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2,\n   648\u2192      y: ty * TILE_SIZE - 10,\n   649\u2192      text,\n   650\u2192      life: durationMs,\n   651\u2192      maxLife: durationMs,\n   652\u2192    });\n   653\u2192  }\n   654\u2192\n   655\u2192  /** Add a speech bubble attached to a character (follows their position). */\n   656\u2192  addCharacterSpeech(character, text, durationMs = 5000) {\n   657\u2192    // Remove any existing bubble for this character\n   658\u2192    this.speechBubbles = this.speechBubbles.filter(b => b.character !== character);\n   659\u2192\n   660\u2192    // Truncate long text for the tiny canvas\n   661\u2192    const maxLen = 60;\n   662\u2192    const truncated = text.length > maxLen ? text.substring(0, maxLen - 1) + '\\u2026' : text;\n   663\u2192\n   664\u2192    this.speechBubbles.push({\n   665\u2192      character,\n   666\u2192      text: truncated,\n   667\u2192      life: durationMs,\n   668\u2192      maxLife: durationMs,\n   669\u2192    });\n   670\u2192  }\n   671\u2192\n   672\u2192  setStatus(text) {\n   673\u2192    this.statusText = text;\n   674\u2192  }\n   675\u2192\n   676\u2192  _wrapText(ctx, text, maxWidth) {\n   677\u2192    const words = text.split(' ');\n   678\u2192    const lines = [];\n   679\u2192    let current = '';\n   680\u2192\n   681\u2192    for (const word of words) {\n   682\u2192      const test = current ? current + ' ' + word : word;\n   683\u2192      if (ctx.measureText(test).width > maxWidth && current) {\n   684\u2192        lines.push(current);\n   685\u2192        current = word;\n   686\u2192      } else {\n   687\u2192        current = test;\n   688\u2192      }\n   689\u2192    }\n   690\u2192    if (current) lines.push(current);\n   691\u2192    return lines.length > 0 ? lines : [text];\n   692\u2192  }\n   693\u2192\n   694\u2192  renderSpeechBubbles(dt) {\n   695\u2192    const ctx = this.textCtx;\n   696\u2192    const s = this.textScale;\n   697\u2192    const fontSize = Math.round(5 * s);\n   698\u2192    ctx.font = `${fontSize}px monospace`;\n   699\u2192    ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n   700\u2192\n   701\u2192    for (let i = this.speechBubbles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n   702\u2192      const b = this.speechBubbles[i];\n   703\u2192      b.life -= dt;\n   704\u2192      if (b.life <= 0) {\n   705\u2192        this.speechBubbles.splice(i, 1);\n   706\u2192        continue;\n   707\u2192      }\n   708\u2192\n   709\u2192      // Calculate anchor position (native coords scaled to text canvas)\n   710\u2192      let anchorX, anchorY;\n   711\u2192      if (b.character) {\n   712\u2192        anchorX = (b.character.px + TILE_SIZE / 2) * s;\n   713\u2192        anchorY = (b.character.py - 10) * s;\n   714\u2192      } else {\n   715\u2192        anchorX = b.x * s;\n   716\u2192        anchorY = b.y * s;\n   717\u2192      }\n   718\u2192\n   719\u2192      const alpha = Math.min(1, b.life / 500);\n   720\u2192      ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;\n   721\u2192\n   722\u2192      // Word wrap\n   723\u2192      const maxBubbleW = 100 * s;\n   724\u2192      const lines = this._wrapText(ctx, b.text, maxBubbleW - 8 * s);\n   725\u2192      const lineH = 7 * s;\n   726\u2192      const padX = 4 * s;\n   727\u2192      const padY = 3 * s;\n   728\u2192\n   729\u2192      let maxLineW = 0;\n   730\u2192      for (const line of lines) {\n   731\u2192        const w = ctx.measureText(line).width;\n   732\u2192        if (w > maxLineW) maxLineW = w;\n   733\u2192      }\n   734\u2192\n   735\u2192      const bw = maxLineW + padX * 2;\n   736\u2192      const bh = lines.length * lineH + padY * 2;\n   737\u2192      let bx = anchorX - bw / 2;\n   738\u2192      const by = anchorY - bh;\n   739\u2192\n   740\u2192      // Clamp to canvas bounds\n   741\u2192      bx = Math.max(s, Math.min(bx, this.textCanvas.width - bw - s));\n   742\u2192\n   743\u2192      // Background\n   744\u2192      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';\n   745\u2192      ctx.beginPath();\n   746\u2192      ctx.roundRect(bx, by, bw, bh, 3 * s);\n   747\u2192      ctx.fill();\n   748\u2192\n   749\u2192      // Tail\n   750\u2192      const tailX = Math.max(bx + 4 * s, Math.min(anchorX, bx + bw - 4 * s));\n   751\u2192      ctx.beginPath();\n   752\u2192      ctx.moveTo(tailX - 3 * s, by + bh);\n   753\u2192      ctx.lineTo(tailX, by + bh + 4 * s);\n   754\u2192      ctx.lineTo(tailX + 3 * s, by + bh);\n   755\u2192      ctx.fill();\n   756\u2192\n   757\u2192      // Text lines\n   758\u2192      ctx.fillStyle = '#222222';\n   759\u2192      for (let l = 0; l < lines.length; l++) {\n   760\u2192        ctx.fillText(lines[l], bx + bw / 2, by + padY + (l + 1) * lineH - s);\n   761\u2192      }\n   762\u2192    }\n   763\u2192\n   764\u2192    ctx.globalAlpha = 1;\n   765\u2192  }\n   766\u2192\n   767\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Status Bar \u2500\u2500\n   768\u2192  renderStatusBar() {\n   769\u2192    if (!this.statusText) return;\n   770\u2192\n   771\u2192    const ctx = this.textCtx;\n   772\u2192    const s = this.textScale;\n   773\u2192    const tw = this.textCanvas.width;\n   774\u2192    const th = this.textCanvas.height;\n   775\u2192    const barH = 12 * s;\n   776\u2192    const y = th - barH;\n   777\u2192\n   778\u2192    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';\n   779\u2192    ctx.fillRect(0, y, tw, barH);\n   780\u2192\n   781\u2192    const fontSize = Math.round(5 * s);\n   782\u2192    ctx.font = `${fontSize}px monospace`;\n   783\u2192    ctx.fillStyle = '#d0ccc4';\n   784\u2192    ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n   785\u2192\n   786\u2192    // Truncate if too wide\n   787\u2192    let text = this.statusText;\n   788\u2192    while (ctx.measureText(text).width > tw - 8 * s && text.length > 10) {\n   789\u2192      text = text.substring(0, text.length - 4) + '\\u2026';\n   790\u2192    }\n   791\u2192\n   792\u2192    ctx.fillText(text, tw / 2, y + 8 * s);\n   793\u2192  }\n   794\u2192\n   795\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Emoji Float \u2500\u2500\n   796\u2192  addEmojiFloat(tx, ty, emoji) {\n   797\u2192    this.emojiFloats.push({\n   798\u2192      x: tx * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2,\n   799\u2192      y: ty * TILE_SIZE,\n   800\u2192      emoji,\n   801\u2192      life: 1500,\n   802\u2192      maxLife: 1500,\n   803\u2192    });\n   804\u2192  }\n   805\u2192\n   806\u2192  renderEmojiFloats(dt) {\n   807\u2192    const ctx = this.textCtx;\n   808\u2192    const s = this.textScale;\n   809\u2192    ctx.font = `${Math.round(12 * s)}px serif`;\n   810\u2192    ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n   811\u2192\n   812\u2192    for (let i = this.emojiFloats.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n   813\u2192      const e = this.emojiFloats[i];\n   814\u2192      e.life -= dt;\n   815\u2192      if (e.life <= 0) {\n   816\u2192        this.emojiFloats.splice(i, 1);\n   817\u2192        continue;\n   818\u2192      }\n   819\u2192\n   820\u2192      const progress = 1 - e.life / e.maxLife;\n   821\u2192      const alpha = 1 - progress;\n   822\u2192      const yOff = -progress * 20;\n   823\u2192\n   824\u2192      ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;\n   825\u2192      ctx.fillText(e.emoji, e.x * s, (e.y + yOff) * s);\n   826\u2192    }\n   827\u2192\n   828\u2192    ctx.globalAlpha = 1;\n   829\u2192  }\n   830\u2192\n   831\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Highlight a tile (for hover/click feedback) \u2500\u2500\n   832\u2192  highlightTile(tx, ty, color = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.25)') {\n   833\u2192    this.ctx.fillStyle = color;\n   834\u2192    this.ctx.fillRect(tx * TILE_SIZE, ty * TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);\n   835\u2192  }\n   836\u2192\n   837\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Day/Night Cycle \u2500\u2500\n   838\u2192\n   839\u2192  _initStars() {\n   840\u2192    this._stars = [];\n   841\u2192    for (let row = 0; row < MAP_ROWS; row++) {\n   842\u2192      for (let col = 0; col < MAP_COLS; col++) {\n   843\u2192        const tile = MAP[row][col];\n   844\u2192        if (tile === T.WALL || tile === T.DOOR) {\n   845\u2192          const count = 1 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 2);\n   846\u2192          for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n   847\u2192            this._stars.push({\n   848\u2192              x: col * TILE_SIZE + Math.random() * TILE_SIZE,\n   849\u2192              y: row * TILE_SIZE + Math.random() * TILE_SIZE,\n   850\u2192              phase: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,\n   851\u2192              size: 0.5 + Math.random() * 0.8,\n   852\u2192            });\n   853\u2192          }\n   854\u2192        }\n   855\u2192      }\n   856\u2192    }\n   857\u2192  }\n   858\u2192\n   859\u2192  _initWaterTiles() {\n   860\u2192    this._waterTiles = [];\n   861\u2192    for (let row = 0; row < MAP_ROWS; row++) {\n   862\u2192      for (let col = 0; col < MAP_COLS; col++) {\n   863\u2192        if (false) { // no water tiles in caf\u00e9\n   864\u2192          this._waterTiles.push({\n   865\u2192            x: col * TILE_SIZE,\n   866\u2192            y: row * TILE_SIZE,\n   867\u2192            phase: (row * MAP_COLS + col) * 0.7,\n   868\u2192          });\n   869\u2192        }\n   870\u2192      }\n   871\u2192    }\n   872\u2192  }\n   873\u2192\n   874\u2192  _initWindowTiles() {\n   875\u2192    this._windowTiles = [];\n   876\u2192    for (let row = 0; row < MAP_ROWS; row++) {\n   877\u2192      for (let col = 0; col < MAP_COLS; col++) {\n   878\u2192        if (MAP[row][col] === T.FLOOR_WOOD || MAP[row][col] === T.FLOOR_TILE) {\n   879\u2192          const neighbors = [\n   880\u2192            [row - 1, col], [row + 1, col], [row, col - 1], [row, col + 1],\n   881\u2192          ];\n   882\u2192          const hasWall = neighbors.some(([r, c]) =>\n   883\u2192            r >= 0 && r < MAP_ROWS && c >= 0 && c < MAP_COLS && MAP[r][c] === T.WALL\n   884\u2192          );\n   885\u2192          if (hasWall) {\n   886\u2192            this._windowTiles.push({ x: col * TILE_SIZE, y: row * TILE_SIZE });\n   887\u2192          }\n   888\u2192        }\n   889\u2192      }\n   890\u2192    }\n   891\u2192  }\n   892\u2192\n   893\u2192  _initLanternPositions() {\n   894\u2192    this._lanternPositions = [];\n   895\u2192    for (const prop of PROPS) {\n   896\u2192      if (prop.type === 'lantern') {\n   897\u2192        this._lanternPositions.push({\n   898\u2192          cx: prop.tx * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2,\n   899\u2192          cy: prop.ty * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2,\n   900\u2192        });\n   901\u2192      }\n   902\u2192    }\n   903\u2192  }\n   904\u2192\n   905\u2192  _getDayNightState(minuteOfDay) {\n   906\u2192    const m = minuteOfDay;\n   907\u2192    const TRANS = 30;\n   908\u2192    const half = TRANS / 2;\n   909\u2192\n   910\u2192    const NIGHT   = [0, 0, 50, 0.3];\n   911\u2192    const GOLDEN  = [255, 160, 40, 0.08];\n   912\u2192    const MORNING = [255, 200, 50, 0.1];\n   913\u2192    const DAY     = [0, 0, 0, 0];\n   914\u2192    const EVENING = [255, 100, 0, 0.15];\n   915\u2192\n   916\u2192    function lerp4(a, b, t) {\n   917\u2192      return [\n   918\u2192        a[0] + (b[0] - a[0]) * t,\n   919\u2192        a[1] + (b[1] - a[1]) * t,\n   920\u2192        a[2] + (b[2] - a[2]) * t,\n   921\u2192        a[3] + (b[3] - a[3]) * t,\n   922\u2192      ];\n   923\u2192    }\n   924\u2192\n   925\u2192    function lerpN(a, b, t) { return a + (b - a) * t; }\n   926\u2192\n   927\u2192    // Pre-dawn golden hour at 5am (300), sunrise at 6am (360)\n   928\u2192    if (m < 300 - half) return { tint: NIGHT, nightFactor: 1 };\n   929\u2192    if (m < 300 + half) {\n   930\u2192      const t = (m - (300 - half)) / TRANS;\n   931\u2192      return { tint: lerp4(NIGHT, GOLDEN, t), nightFactor: lerpN(1, 0.15, t) };\n   932\u2192    }\n   933\u2192    if (m < 360 - half) return { tint: GOLDEN, nightFactor: 0.15 };\n   934\u2192    if (m < 360 + half) {\n   935\u2192      const t = (m - (360 - half)) / TRANS;\n   936\u2192      return { tint: lerp4(GOLDEN, MORNING, t), nightFactor: lerpN(0.15, 0, t) };\n   937\u2192    }\n   938\u2192    // Morning (6-10am)\n   939\u2192    if (m < 600 - half) return { tint: MORNING, nightFactor: 0 };\n   940\u2192    if (m < 600 + half) {\n   941\u2192      const t = (m - (600 - half)) / TRANS;\n   942\u2192      return { tint: lerp4(MORNING, DAY, t), nightFactor: 0 };\n   943\u2192    }\n   944\u2192    // Day (10am-5pm)\n   945\u2192    if (m < 1020 - half) return { tint: DAY, nightFactor: 0 };\n   946\u2192    if (m < 1020 + half) {\n   947\u2192      const t = (m - (1020 - half)) / TRANS;\n   948\u2192      return { tint: lerp4(DAY, EVENING, t), nightFactor: 0 };\n   949\u2192    }\n   950\u2192    // Evening (5-7pm)\n   951\u2192    if (m < 1140 - half) return { tint: EVENING, nightFactor: 0 };\n   952\u2192    // Sunset golden hour at 7pm (1140), night at 8pm (1200)\n   953\u2192    if (m < 1140 + half) {\n   954\u2192      const t = (m - (1140 - half)) / TRANS;\n   955\u2192      return { tint: lerp4(EVENING, GOLDEN, t), nightFactor: lerpN(0, 0.15, t) };\n   956\u2192    }\n   957\u2192    if (m < 1200 - half) return { tint: GOLDEN, nightFactor: 0.15 };\n   958\u2192    if (m < 1200 + half) {\n   959\u2192      const t = (m - (1200 - half)) / TRANS;\n   960\u2192      return { tint: lerp4(GOLDEN, NIGHT, t), nightFactor: lerpN(0.15, 1, t) };\n   961\u2192    }\n   962\u2192    return { tint: NIGHT, nightFactor: 1 };\n   963\u2192  }\n   964\u2192\n   965\u2192  renderDayNightCycle(minuteOfDay, now) {\n   966\u2192    const { tint, nightFactor } = this._getDayNightState(minuteOfDay);\n   967\u2192    const ctx = this.ctx;\n   968\u2192\n   969\u2192    // Tint overlay \u2014 one fillRect per frame\n   970\u2192    if (tint[3] > 0) {\n   971\u2192      ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${tint[0] | 0}, ${tint[1] | 0}, ${tint[2] | 0}, ${tint[3]})`;\n   972\u2192      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, MAP_W, MAP_H);\n   973\u2192    }\n   974\u2192\n   975\u2192    // Window glow \u2014 warm amber rectangles on interior tiles at night\n   976\u2192    if (nightFactor > 0.1) {\n   977\u2192      if (!this._windowTiles) this._initWindowTiles();\n   978\u2192      ctx.fillStyle = '#f0d888';\n   979\u2192      ctx.globalAlpha = 0.15 + nightFactor * 0.1;\n   980\u2192      for (const tile of this._windowTiles) {\n   981\u2192        ctx.fillRect(tile.x, tile.y, TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);\n   982\u2192      }\n   983\u2192      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;\n   984\u2192    }\n   985\u2192\n   986\u2192    // Lantern glow \u2014 radial gradient circles at lantern positions\n   987\u2192    if (nightFactor > 0.1) {\n   988\u2192      if (!this._lanternPositions) this._initLanternPositions();\n   989\u2192      const glowAlpha = 0.3 + nightFactor * 0.2;\n   990\u2192      const radius = TILE_SIZE * 2;\n   991\u2192\n   992\u2192      for (const lantern of this._lanternPositions) {\n   993\u2192        const gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(\n   994\u2192          lantern.cx, lantern.cy, 0,\n   995\u2192          lantern.cx, lantern.cy, radius\n   996\u2192        );\n   997\u2192        gradient.addColorStop(0, `rgba(240, 216, 136, ${glowAlpha})`);\n   998\u2192        gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(240, 216, 136, 0)');\n   999\u2192        ctx.fillStyle = gradient;\n  1000\u2192        ctx.fillRect(\n  1001\u2192          lantern.cx - radius, lantern.cy - radius,\n  1002\u2192          radius * 2, radius * 2\n  1003\u2192        );\n  1004\u2192      }\n  1005\u2192    }\n  1006\u2192\n  1007\u2192    // Stars \u2014 twinkling white dots on WALL/DOOR tiles during night\n  1008\u2192    if (nightFactor > 0) {\n  1009\u2192      if (!this._stars) this._initStars();\n  1010\u2192      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';\n  1011\u2192      for (const star of this._stars) {\n  1012\u2192        const twinkle = 0.3 + 0.7 * (0.5 + 0.5 * Math.sin(now * 0.003 + star.phase));\n  1013\u2192        ctx.globalAlpha = nightFactor * twinkle;\n  1014\u2192        ctx.fillRect(star.x - star.size / 2, star.y - star.size / 2, star.size, star.size);\n  1015\u2192      }\n  1016\u2192      ctx.globalAlpha = 1;\n  1017\u2192    }\n  1018\u2192  }\n  1019\u2192\n  1020\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Pond Ripple \u2500\u2500\n  1021\u2192  renderPondRipple(now) {\n  1022\u2192    if (!this._waterTiles) this._initWaterTiles();\n  1023\u2192    const ctx = this.ctx;\n  1024\u2192    for (const tile of this._waterTiles) {\n  1025\u2192      const shimmer = 0.5 + 0.5 * Math.sin(now * 0.002 + tile.phase);\n  1026\u2192      ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';\n  1027\u2192      ctx.globalAlpha = shimmer * 0.1;\n  1028\u2192      ctx.fillRect(tile.x, tile.y, TILE_SIZE, TILE_SIZE);\n  1029\u2192    }\n  1030\u2192    ctx.globalAlpha = 1;\n  1031\u2192  }\n  1032\u2192\n  1033\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Ambient Particles (fireflies, leaves) \u2500\u2500\n  1034\u2192  _updateAmbientParticles(dt, minuteOfDay) {\n  1035\u2192    const isNight = minuteOfDay >= 1200 || minuteOfDay < 360;\n  1036\u2192\n  1037\u2192    // Fireflies \u2014 night only, up to 6\n  1038\u2192    if (isNight) {\n  1039\u2192      const fireflyCount = this._ambientParticles.filter(p => p.type === 'firefly').length;\n  1040\u2192      if (fireflyCount < 6) {\n  1041\u2192        this._ambientParticles.push({\n  1042\u2192          type: 'firefly',\n  1043\u2192          x: Math.random() * MAP_W,\n  1044\u2192          y: MAP_H * 0.2 + Math.random() * MAP_H * 0.6,\n  1045\u2192          vx: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n  1046\u2192          vy: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02,\n  1047\u2192          dirTimer: 1000 + Math.random() * 2000,\n  1048\u2192          phase: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,\n  1049\u2192          size: 1 + Math.random() * 0.5,\n  1050\u2192          life: 8000 + Math.random() * 12000,\n  1051\u2192        });\n  1052\u2192      }\n  1053\u2192    }\n  1054\u2192\n  1055\u2192    // Leaf \u2014 one every 15-30 seconds\n  1056\u2192    this._leafTimer -= dt;\n  1057\u2192    if (this._leafTimer <= 0) {\n  1058\u2192      this._leafTimer = 15000 + Math.random() * 15000;\n  1059\u2192      const hasLeaf = this._ambientParticles.some(p => p.type === 'leaf');\n  1060\u2192      if (!hasLeaf) {\n  1061\u2192        this._ambientParticles.push({\n  1062\u2192          type: 'leaf',\n  1063\u2192          x: -4,\n  1064\u2192          y: Math.random() * MAP_H * 0.3,\n  1065\u2192          vx: 0.015 + Math.random() * 0.01,\n  1066\u2192          vy: 0.01 + Math.random() * 0.008,\n  1067\u2192          rotation: Math.random() * Math.PI,\n  1068\u2192          rotSpeed: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.002,\n  1069\u2192          life: 30000,\n  1070\u2192          color: Math.random() > 0.5 ? '#5a7a3a' : '#7a5a2a',\n  1071\u2192        });\n  1072\u2192      }\n  1073\u2192    }\n  1074\u2192\n  1075\u2192    // Update all ambient particles\n  1076\u2192    for (let i = this._ambientParticles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n  1077\u2192      const p = this._ambientParticles[i];\n  1078\u2192      p.life -= dt;\n  1079\u2192\n  1080\u2192      if (p.type === 'firefly') {\n  1081\u2192        if (!isNight) p.life = Math.min(p.life, 500); // fade out at dawn\n  1082\u2192        p.dirTimer -= dt;\n  1083\u2192        if (p.dirTimer <= 0) {\n  1084\u2192          p.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02;\n  1085\u2192          p.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02;\n  1086\u2192          p.dirTimer = 1000 + Math.random() * 2000;\n  1087\u2192        }\n  1088\u2192        if (p.x < 10 || p.x > MAP_W - 10) p.vx = -p.vx;\n  1089\u2192        if (p.y < 10 || p.y > MAP_H - 20) p.vy = -p.vy;\n  1090\u2192      }\n  1091\u2192\n  1092\u2192      p.x += p.vx * dt;\n  1093\u2192      p.y += p.vy * dt;\n  1094\u2192      if (p.rotation !== undefined) p.rotation += p.rotSpeed * dt;\n  1095\u2192\n  1096\u2192      if (p.life <= 0 || p.x > MAP_W + 10 || p.y > MAP_H + 10) {\n  1097\u2192        this._ambientParticles.splice(i, 1);\n  1098\u2192      }\n  1099\u2192    }\n  1100\u2192  }\n  1101\u2192\n  1102\u2192  renderAmbientParticles(now) {\n  1103\u2192    const ctx = this.ctx;\n  1104\u2192\n  1105\u2192    for (const p of this._ambientParticles) {\n  1106\u2192      if (p.type === 'firefly') {\n  1107\u2192        const glow = 0.4 + 0.6 * (0.5 + 0.5 * Math.sin(now * 0.004 + p.phase));\n  1108\u2192        const fade = Math.min(1, p.life / 500);\n  1109\u2192        ctx.globalAlpha = glow * fade;\n  1110\u2192        ctx.fillStyle = '#aadd44';\n  1111\u2192        ctx.beginPath();\n  1112\u2192        ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n  1113\u2192        ctx.fill();\n  1114\u2192        // Glow halo\n  1115\u2192        ctx.globalAlpha = glow * fade * 0.25;\n  1116\u2192        ctx.beginPath();\n  1117\u2192        ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.size * 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n  1118\u2192        ctx.fill();\n  1119\u2192      } else if (p.type === 'leaf') {\n  1120\u2192        ctx.globalAlpha = 0.7;\n  1121\u2192        ctx.save();\n  1122\u2192        ctx.translate(p.x, p.y);\n  1123\u2192        ctx.rotate(p.rotation);\n  1124\u2192        ctx.fillStyle = p.color;\n  1125\u2192        ctx.fillRect(-1.5, -1, 3, 2);\n  1126\u2192        ctx.restore();\n  1127\u2192      }\n  1128\u2192    }\n  1129\u2192\n  1130\u2192    ctx.globalAlpha = 1;\n  1131\u2192  }\n  1132\u2192\n  1133\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 Full render frame \u2500\u2500\n  1134\u2192  startLoop(getObjects, getCharacters, options = {}) {\n  1135\u2192    this._lastTime = performance.now();\n  1136\u2192\n  1137\u2192    const frame = (now) => {\n  1138\u2192      const dt = Math.min(now - this._lastTime, 100);\n  1139\u2192      this._lastTime = now;\n  1140\u2192\n  1141\u2192      const objects = getObjects();\n  1142\u2192      const characters = getCharacters ? getCharacters() : null;\n  1143\u2192      const showDebug = options.showDebug && options.showDebug();\n  1144\u2192\n  1145\u2192      // Build active interactions map for object flash effects\n  1146\u2192      this._activeInteractions = null;\n  1147\u2192      if (characters) {\n  1148\u2192        for (const char of characters) {\n  1149\u2192          if (char.action === 'interacting' && char.targetObjectId) {\n  1150\u2192            if (!this._activeInteractions) this._activeInteractions = new Map();\n  1151\u2192            this._activeInteractions.set(char.targetObjectId, 2000 - char.interactTimer);\n  1152\u2192          }\n  1153\u2192        }\n  1154\u2192      }\n  1155\u2192\n  1156\u2192      // \u2500\u2500 Main canvas (pixel art at native 768\u00d71152 resolution) \u2500\u2500\n  1157\u2192      // Fill with solid background to prevent transparency bleed-through\n  1158\u2192      this.ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a2e'; // caf\u00e9 night background\n  1159\u2192      this.ctx.fillRect(0, 0, MAP_W, MAP_H);\n  1160\u2192\n  1161\u2192      // Layer 1: tilemap\n  1162\u2192      this.renderTilemap();\n  1163\u2192\n  1164\u2192      // Layer 1.5: pond ripple (water tile oscillation)\n  1165\u2192      this.renderPondRipple(now);\n  1166\u2192\n  1167\u2192      // Layer 2: objects\n  1168\u2192      this.renderObjects(objects);\n  1169\u2192\n  1170\u2192      // Layer 3: characters (sprites only, labels on text canvas)\n  1171\u2192      if (characters) {\n  1172\u2192        this.renderCharacters(characters);\n  1173\u2192      }\n  1174\u2192\n  1175\u2192      // Layer 4: particles\n  1176\u2192      this.renderParticles(dt);\n  1177\u2192\n  1178\u2192      // Layer 5: day/night cycle tint + stars\n  1179\u2192      if (options.getSimClock) {\n  1180\u2192        const clock = options.getSimClock();\n  1181\u2192        this.renderDayNightCycle(clock.minuteOfDay, now);\n  1182\u2192        this._updateAmbientParticles(dt, clock.minuteOfDay);\n  1183\u2192      }\n  1184\u2192\n  1185\u2192      // Layer 5.5: ambient particles (fireflies glow through night tint, leaves)\n  1186\u2192      this.renderAmbientParticles(now);\n  1187\u2192\n  1188\u2192      // \u2500\u2500 Text overlay canvas (high-res for crisp text/emoji) \u2500\u2500\n  1189\u2192      this.textCtx.clearRect(0, 0, this.textCanvas.width, this.textCanvas.height);\n  1190\u2192\n  1191\u2192      // Character labels (mood emoji + names)\n  1192\u2192      if (characters) {\n  1193\u2192        this.renderCharacterLabels(characters, showDebug);\n  1194\u2192      }\n  1195\u2192\n  1196\u2192      // Emoji floats\n  1197\u2192      this.renderEmojiFloats(dt);\n  1198\u2192\n  1199\u2192      // Speech bubbles\n  1200\u2192      this.renderSpeechBubbles(dt);\n  1201\u2192\n  1202\u2192      // Status bar\n  1203\u2192      this.renderStatusBar();\n  1204\u2192\n  1205\u2192      // Debug object labels\n  1206\u2192      if (showDebug) {\n  1207\u2192        this.renderObjectLabels(objects);\n  1208\u2192      }\n  1209\u2192\n  1210\u2192      // Custom render callback\n  1211\u2192      if (this._renderCallback) {\n  1212\u2192        this._renderCallback(this.ctx, dt);\n  1213\u2192      }\n  1214\u2192\n  1215\u2192      this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame(frame);\n  1216\u2192    };\n  1217\u2192\n  1218\u2192    this._rafId = requestAnimationFrame(frame);\n  1219\u2192  }\n  1220\u2192\n  1221\u2192  stopLoop() {\n  1222\u2192    if (this._rafId) {\n  1223\u2192      cancelAnimationFrame(this._rafId);\n  1224\u2192      this._rafId = null;\n  1225\u2192    }\n  1226\u2192  }\n  1227\u2192\n  1228\u2192  onRender(callback) {\n  1229\u2192    this._renderCallback = callback;\n  1230\u2192  }\n  1231\u2192}\n  1232\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
  }
}
ASSISTANTMESSAGE #46
Now I've read the full code. Let me identify the bugs related to the walk animation: **Bug 1: `if` instead of `while` in the walk animation timer (characters.js, line 203)** ```javascript this.walkTimer += deltaMs; if (this.walkTimer >= this.walkFrameMs) { // Should be 'while' this.walkTimer -= this.walkFrameMs; this.walkFrame = (this.walkFrame + 1) % 4; } ``` At low frame rates (or when the tab loses focus and the animation frame timer catches up), `deltaMs` could span multiple `walkFrameMs` intervals. Using `if` means only ONE frame advances per update call, causing the animation timer to accumulate indefinitely. This can lead to: - After a large deltaMs frame (e.g., 600ms), the walkTimer keeps accumulating surplus time - When FPS recovers, the animation runs too fast (every frame) until the surplus drains - This would appear as animation stuttering - sometimes too slow, sometimes too fast **Bug 2: Walk animation timer doesn't reset when walking stops (characters.js)** When `action` changes from `walking` to `idle`, the `walkTimer` and `walkFrame` are NOT reset. This means when the character starts walking again later, they pick up where they left off instead of starting fresh, which is a minor state management issue. **Bug 3: Missing `walkTimer` and `walkFrame` reset when `moveTo` is called** Similarly, when a new path is assigned in `moveTo()`, the timer and frame aren't reset, which is also a minor inconsistency. The core issue causing the stutter is **Bug 1** - using `if` instead of `while` in the timer logic. When delta time spikes, the timer accumulates but only advances one frame per update, then on the next shorter frame it still has that large accumulated value and advances again immediately, creating the jittery effect. The fix is simply changing that `if` to `while` so the timer properly drains the accumulated time across multiple frames in a single update. Looking at the `moveTo()` function, I can see it resets `moveProgress` and sets the action to walking, but it doesn't reset `walkTimer` and `walkFrame`. This means if a character was already walking and gets a new movement command, those animation state variables carry over from the previous walk, which could cause the animation to start mid-frame or skip ahead. The "freezes mid-movement" issue is more likely caused by the `if` versus `while` problem in the walk timer logic. When the browser experiences lag from tab switching or heavy CPU load, large deltaMs values accumulate, but the code only advances one animation frame per update instead of multiple. This creates the appearance of freezing, then rapid catch-up when smaller frames resume. I should also check the outer `if` condition in the update method—if `path.length` somehow becomes zero while `action` is still set to 'walking', the animation would stop advancing even though the action state hasn't been cleared. Looking at the arrival logic, when the path empties, the action gets set to 'idle' and moveProgress resets, so the walkTimer shouldn't get stuck in that state. But there's a subtle issue with how the animation update block handles the path becoming empty mid-cycle—the condition checks happen in a specific order that might leave the animation in an inconsistent state. The real bug is that the walk animation timer uses `if` instead of `while` for the frame advancement, which is the classic fixed-timestep problem where low frame rates cause the timer to fall behind. I should also consider whether walkFrame needs to reset when a new walk starts, but since the animation doesn't look wrong starting mid-cycle and the issue specifically mentions breaking mid-movement rather than starting incorrectly, that's probably not the main problem to fix. is: change `if` to `while` in the walk animation timer at line 203. Additionally, I should also reset `walkTimer` and `walkFrame` when `moveTo` is called, to ensure the animation always starts cleanly from frame 1 (walk1). This would prevent any accumulated timer state from causing rapid frame advances at the start of a new walk. Actually, let me reconsider. The issue says "stutters or freezes partway through movement." This suggests the animation breaks DURING walking, not at the start. The `if` vs `while` bug would cause this: during walking, if the FPS drops momentarily (even for one frame), the walkTimer accumulates a surplus. Then on subsequent frames, the animation might advance too fast (draining the surplus by advancing every other frame instead of every 200ms). This would look like a stutter. With low frame rates around 3fps where each frame is roughly 333ms, the `if` statement causes the timer to leak. Each frame adds 333ms but only consumes 200ms, leaving a growing surplus that compounds frame after frame. Using `while` instead properly drains the accumulated time by advancing multiple frames when needed, keeping the animation smooth and preventing the stuttering effect. so at most 2-3 iterations which is totally fine. Now I'll apply the fix—just changing that `if` to `while` on line 203 in `characters.js`. I'm also wondering if I should reset `walkFrame` when starting a new walk animation, so let me check the `moveTo()` method to see if that needs initialization. Adding a reset for the animation frame and timer at the start of a new path would be a clean improvement that prevents potential stutter, even though it's not strictly required to fix the mid-movement bug. But now I'm realizing that resetting `walkFrame` to 0 every time a character starts walking means they'll always begin from the same point in the animation cycle, which might actually be the right behavior. I'll keep the fix focused on the core issue—changing that `if` to `while` on line 203—and skip the optional improvements for now to stay minimal and targeted.

ASSISTANTMESSAGE #47
Now I understand the bug clearly. In `characters.js` line 203, the walk animation timer uses `if` instead of `while`, so when `deltaMs` spans multiple frame intervals (e.g., during a dropped frame), only ONE frame advances instead of the correct number. The surplus accumulates and then rapid-fire advances cause visual stuttering.
▶ VIEW RAW DATA 
{
  "content": {
    "type": "text",
    "text": "Now I understand the bug clearly. In `characters.js` line 203, the walk animation timer uses `if` instead of `while`, so when `deltaMs` spans multiple frame intervals (e.g., during a dropped frame), only ONE frame advances instead of the correct number. The surplus accumulates and then rapid-fire advances cause visual stuttering."
  }
}

{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/home/gem/project/src/characters.js",
  "old_string": "      // Walk animation cycle (4 frames)\n      this.walkTimer += deltaMs;\n      if (this.walkTimer >= this.walkFrameMs) {\n        this.walkTimer -= this.walkFrameMs;\n        this.walkFrame = (this.walkFrame + 1) % 4;\n      }",
  "new_string": "      // Walk animation cycle (4 frames)\n      this.walkTimer += deltaMs;\n      while (this.walkTimer >= this.walkFrameMs) {\n        this.walkTimer -= this.walkFrameMs;\n        this.walkFrame = (this.walkFrame + 1) % 4;\n      }"
}

      "old_string": "      // Walk animation cycle (4 frames)\n      this.walkTimer += deltaMs;\n      if (this.walkTimer >= this.walkFrameMs) {\n        this.walkTimer -= this.walkFrameMs;\n        this.walkFrame = (this.walkFrame + 1) % 4;\n      }",
      "new_string": "      // Walk animation cycle (4 frames)\n      this.walkTimer += deltaMs;\n      while (this.walkTimer >= this.walkFrameMs) {\n        this.walkTimer -= this.walkFrameMs;\n        this.walkFrame = (this.walkFrame + 1) % 4;\n      }"
    },

{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/home/gem/project/src/characters.js",
  "old_string": "  /** Start moving toward a goal tile. Returns true if a path was found. */\n  moveTo(goalTx, goalTy) {\n    const path = findPath(Math.round(this.tx), Math.round(this.ty), goalTx, goalTy);\n    if (path && path.length > 0) {\n      this.path = path;\n      this.prevTx = Math.round(this.tx);\n      this.prevTy = Math.round(this.ty);\n      this.moveProgress = 0;\n      this.action = 'walking';\n      this._updateFacing(path[0].tx - this.prevTx, path[0].ty - this.prevTy);\n      return true;\n    }\n    return false;\n  }",
  "new_string": "  /** Start moving toward a goal tile. Returns true if a path was found. */\n  moveTo(goalTx, goalTy) {\n    const path = findPath(Math.round(this.tx), Math.round(this.ty), goalTx, goalTy);\n    if (path && path.length > 0) {\n      this.path = path;\n      this.prevTx = Math.round(this.tx);\n      this.prevTy = Math.round(this.ty);\n      this.moveProgress = 0;\n      this.walkFrame = 0;\n      this.walkTimer = 0;\n      this.action = 'walking';\n      this._updateFacing(path[0].tx - this.prevTx, path[0].ty - this.prevTy);\n      return true;\n    }\n    return false;\n  }"
}

      "old_string": "  /** Start moving toward a goal tile. Returns true if a path was found. */\n  moveTo(goalTx, goalTy) {\n    const path = findPath(Math.round(this.tx), Math.round(this.ty), goalTx, goalTy);\n    if (path && path.length > 0) {\n      this.path = path;\n      this.prevTx = Math.round(this.tx);\n      this.prevTy = Math.round(this.ty);\n      this.moveProgress = 0;\n      this.action = 'walking';\n      this._updateFacing(path[0].tx - this.prevTx, path[0].ty - this.prevTy);\n      return true;\n    }\n    return false;\n  }",
      "new_string": "  /** Start moving toward a goal tile. Returns true if a path was found. */\n  moveTo(goalTx, goalTy) {\n    const path = findPath(Math.round(this.tx), Math.round(this.ty), goalTx, goalTy);\n    if (path && path.length > 0) {\n      this.path = path;\n      this.prevTx = Math.round(this.tx);\n      this.prevTy = Math.round(this.ty);\n      this.moveProgress = 0;\n      this.walkFrame = 0;\n      this.walkTimer = 0;\n      this.action = 'walking';\n      this._updateFacing(path[0].tx - this.prevTx, path[0].ty - this.prevTy);\n      return true;\n    }\n    return false;\n  }"
    },

✓ TOOL RESULT

   183→  /** Start moving toward a goal tile. Returns true if a path was found. */
   184→  moveTo(goalTx, goalTy) {
   185→    const path = findPath(Math.round(this.tx), Math.round(this.ty), goalTx, goalTy);
   186→    if (path && path.length > 0) {
   187→      this.path = path;
   188→      this.prevTx = Math.round(this.tx);
   189→      this.prevTy = Math.round(this.ty);
   190→      this.moveProgress = 0;
   191→      this.walkFrame = 0;
   192→      this.walkTimer = 0;
   193→      this.action = 'walking';
   194→      this._updateFacing(path[0].tx - this.prevTx, path[0].ty - this.prevTy);
   195→      return true;
   196→    }
   197→    return false;
   198→  }
   199→
   200→  /** Per-frame update: advance position and animation. */
   201→  update(deltaMs) {
   202→    if (this.action === 'walking' && this.path.length > 0) {
   203→      // Walk animation cycle (4 frames)
   204→      this.walkTimer += deltaMs;
   205→      while (this.walkTimer >= this.walkFrameMs) {
   206→        this.walkTimer -= this.walkFrameMs;
   207→        this.walkFrame = (this.walkFrame + 1) % 4;
   208→      }
   209→
   210→      // Advance position along path
   211→      const tileDurationMs = 1000 / this.moveSpeed;
   212→      this.moveProgress += deltaMs / tileDurationMs;

USERMESSAGE #72
✓ TOOL RESULT
SUCCESS 
     1→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     2→// Object State Machine Tests
     3→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     4→//
     5→// Minimal test runner — no dependencies needed.
     6→// Run in browser via index.html debug view, or with:
     7→//   node --experimental-vm-modules tests/objects.test.js
     8→//
     9→// Tests use a simple assert/report pattern.
    10→
    11→import { ObjectInstance, ObjectEngine } from '../src/objects.js';
    12→
    13→let passed = 0;
    14→let failed = 0;
    15→const results = [];
    16→
    17→function assert(condition, name) {
    18→  if (condition) {
    19→    passed++;
    20→    results.push({ name, ok: true });
    21→  } else {
    22→    failed++;
    23→    results.push({ name, ok: false });
    24→    console.error(`  FAIL: ${name}`);
    25→  }
    26→}
    27→
    28→function test(name, fn) {
    29→  try {
    30→    fn();
    31→  } catch (err) {
    32→    failed++;
    33→    results.push({ name, ok: false, error: err.message });
    34→    console.error(`  FAIL: ${name} — ${err.message}`);
    35→  }
    36→}
    37→
    38→// ── Helper: make a fresh oven object ──
    39→
    40→function makeOvenDef() {
    41→  return {
    42→    id: 'bakery_oven',
    43→    name: 'oven',
    44→    sector: 'bakery',
    45→    arena: 'kitchen',
    46→    position: { x: 100, y: 410 },
    47→    state: 'off',
    48→    states: {
    49→      off: {
    50→        visual: 'oven_off',
    51→        transitions: {
    52→          use: { next: 'preheating', requires: 'character' },
    53→        },
    54→      },
    55→      preheating: {
    56→        visual: 'oven_glow',
    57→        particles: 'small_steam',
    58→        auto_next: { state: 'baking', after: 30 },
    59→      },
    60→      baking: {
    61→        visual: 'oven_glow',
    62→        particles: 'steam',
    63→        auto_next: { state: 'done', after: 60 },
    64→      },
    65→      done: {
    66→        visual: 'oven_glow_green',
    67→        particles: 'steam',
    68→        auto_next: { state: 'burnt', after: 30 },
    69→        transitions: {
    70→          use: { next: 'off', produces: 'bread', target: 'bakery_display_case' },
    71→        },
    72→      },
    73→      burnt: {
    74→        visual: 'oven_smoke',
    75→        particles: 'dark_smoke',
    76→        emoji: '😰',
    77→        transitions: {
    78→          use: { next: 'off', produces: 'burnt_bread' },
    79→        },
    80→      },
    81→    },
    82→  };
    83→}
    84→
    85→function makeDisplayCaseDef() {
    86→  return {
    87→    id: 'bakery_display_case',
    88→    name: 'display case',
    89→    sector: 'bakery',
    90→    arena: 'front',
    91→    position: { x: 160, y: 430 },
    92→    state: 'empty',
    93→    states: {
    94→      empty: { visual: 'display_empty' },
    95→      bread: { visual: 'display_bread', transitions: { use: { next: 'empty' } } },
    96→      burnt_bread: { visual: 'display_burnt', transitions: { use: { next: 'empty' } } },
    97→    },
    98→  };
    99→}
   100→
   101→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   102→// Tests
   103→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   104→
   105→test('ObjectInstance: initial state', () => {
   106→  const obj = new ObjectInstance(makeOvenDef());
   107→  assert(obj.state === 'off', 'oven starts in off state');
   108→  assert(obj.visual === 'oven_off', 'visual matches off state');
   109→  assert(obj.timeRemainingMs === null, 'no auto_next timer when off');
   110→});
   111→
   112→test('ObjectInstance: character interaction triggers transition', () => {
   113→  const obj = new ObjectInstance(makeOvenDef());
   114→  const event = obj.interact('use');
   115→  assert(event !== null, 'interact returns an event');
   116→  assert(event.from === 'off', 'event.from is off');
   117→  assert(event.to === 'preheating', 'event.to is preheating');
   118→  assert(obj.state === 'preheating', 'oven is now preheating');
   119→  assert(obj.visual === 'oven_glow', 'visual is oven_glow');
   120→  assert(obj.timeRemainingMs === 30000, 'auto_next timer is 30s');
   121→});
   122→
   123→test('ObjectInstance: invalid interaction returns null', () => {
   124→  const obj = new ObjectInstance(makeOvenDef());
   125→  obj.interact('use'); // → preheating
   126→  const event = obj.interact('use'); // preheating has no 'use' transition
   127→  assert(event === null, 'no valid transition returns null');
   128→});
   129→
   130→test('ObjectInstance: auto_next timer fires', () => {
   131→  const obj = new ObjectInstance(makeOvenDef());
   132→  obj.interact('use'); // → preheating
   133→
   134→  // Tick for less than 30s — no transition
   135→  let event = obj.tick(15000);
   136→  assert(event === null, 'no transition before timer expires');
   137→  assert(obj.state === 'preheating', 'still preheating');
   138→  assert(obj.timer === 15000, 'timer advanced');
   139→
   140→  // Tick past the 30s mark
   141→  event = obj.tick(16000); // total: 31s
   142→  assert(event !== null, 'transition fires after timer expires');
   143→  assert(event.from === 'preheating', 'from preheating');
   144→  assert(event.to === 'baking', 'to baking');
   145→  assert(event.trigger === 'auto', 'trigger is auto');
   146→  assert(obj.state === 'baking', 'oven is now baking');
   147→});
   148→
   149→test('ObjectInstance: full auto-transition chain (preheating → baking → done → burnt)', () => {
   150→  const obj = new ObjectInstance(makeOvenDef());
   151→  obj.interact('use'); // → preheating
   152→
   153→  // preheating → baking (30s)
   154→  obj.tick(30000);
   155→  assert(obj.state === 'baking', 'preheating → baking after 30s');
   156→
   157→  // baking → done (60s)
   158→  obj.tick(60000);
   159→  assert(obj.state === 'done', 'baking → done after 60s');
   160→
   161→  // done → burnt (30s)
   162→  obj.tick(30000);
   163→  assert(obj.state === 'burnt', 'done → burnt after 30s');
   164→
   165→  // burnt has no auto_next — stays burnt
   166→  obj.tick(60000);
   167→  assert(obj.state === 'burnt', 'burnt stays burnt (no auto_next)');
   168→});
   169→
   170→test('ObjectInstance: interaction at done state prevents burning', () => {
   171→  const obj = new ObjectInstance(makeOvenDef());
   172→  obj.interact('use'); // → preheating
   173→  obj.tick(30000);     // → baking
   174→  obj.tick(60000);     // → done
   175→
   176→  // Character takes the bread before it burns
   177→  const event = obj.interact('use');
   178→  assert(event !== null, 'interaction at done succeeds');
   179→  assert(event.to === 'off', 'oven returns to off');
   180→  assert(event.produces === 'bread', 'produces bread');
   181→  assert(event.target === 'bakery_display_case', 'target is display case');
   182→  assert(obj.state === 'off', 'oven is off');
   183→});
   184→
   185→test('ObjectEngine: tick advances all objects', () => {
   186→  const engine = new ObjectEngine();
   187→  engine.addObject(makeOvenDef());
   188→  engine.addObject(makeDisplayCaseDef());
   189→
   190→  // Start the oven
   191→  engine.interact('bakery_oven', 'use'); // → preheating
   192→
   193→  // Tick — only oven has a timer
   194→  let events = engine.tick(30000);
   195→  assert(events.length === 1, 'one transition event');
   196→  assert(events[0].objectId === 'bakery_oven', 'event is from oven');
   197→  assert(events[0].to === 'baking', 'oven transitioned to baking');
   198→});
   199→
   200→test('ObjectEngine: production side-effect (oven → display case)', () => {
   201→  const engine = new ObjectEngine();
   202→  engine.addObject(makeOvenDef());
   203→  engine.addObject(makeDisplayCaseDef());
   204→
   205→  // Run oven through to done
   206→  engine.interact('bakery_oven', 'use'); // → preheating
   207→  engine.tick(30000);                     // → baking
   208→  engine.tick(60000);                     // → done
   209→
   210→  // Character takes bread out
   211→  const event = engine.interact('bakery_oven', 'use');
   212→  assert(event.produces === 'bread', 'oven produces bread');
   213→
   214→  // Check display case got the bread
   215→  const display = engine.get('bakery_display_case');
   216→  assert(display.state === 'bread', 'display case now has bread');
   217→});
   218→
   219→test('ObjectEngine: event listeners fire', () => {
   220→  const engine = new ObjectEngine();
   221→  engine.addObject(makeOvenDef());
   222→
   223→  const received = [];
   224→  engine.onTransition((event) => received.push(event));
   225→
   226→  engine.interact('bakery_oven', 'use'); // → preheating
   227→  assert(received.length === 1, 'listener received interaction event');
   228→  assert(received[0].to === 'preheating', 'event has correct target state');
   229→
   230→  engine.tick(30000); // → baking
   231→  assert(received.length === 2, 'listener received auto-transition event');
   232→});
   233→
   234→test('ObjectEngine: getBySector filters correctly', () => {
   235→  const engine = new ObjectEngine();
   236→  engine.addObject(makeOvenDef());
   237→  engine.addObject(makeDisplayCaseDef());
   238→  engine.addObject({
   239→    id: 'studio_easel',
   240→    name: 'easel',
   241→    sector: 'studio',
   242→    arena: 'workspace',
   243→    position: { x: 400, y: 430 },
   244→    state: 'blank',
   245→    states: { blank: { visual: 'easel_blank' } },
   246→  });
   247→
   248→  const bakeryObjects = engine.getBySector('bakery');
   249→  assert(bakeryObjects.length === 2, 'bakery has 2 objects');
   250→
   251→  const studioObjects = engine.getBySector('studio');
   252→  assert(studioObjects.length === 1, 'studio has 1 object');
   253→});
   254→
   255→test('ObjectEngine: snapshot returns all object states', () => {
   256→  const engine = new ObjectEngine();
   257→  engine.addObject(makeOvenDef());
   258→  engine.addObject(makeDisplayCaseDef());
   259→
   260→  const snap = engine.snapshot();
   261→  assert('bakery_oven' in snap, 'snapshot has oven');
   262→  assert('bakery_display_case' in snap, 'snapshot has display case');
   263→  assert(snap.bakery_oven.state === 'off', 'oven state is off');
   264→  assert(snap.bakery_display_case.state === 'empty', 'display case is empty');
   265→});
   266→
   267→test('ObjectInstance: timeRemainingMs tracks correctly', () => {
   268→  const obj = new ObjectInstance(makeOvenDef());
   269→  obj.interact('use'); // → preheating, 30s timer
   270→  assert(obj.timeRemainingMs === 30000, 'full 30s remaining');
   271→
   272→  obj.tick(10000);
   273→  assert(obj.timeRemainingMs === 20000, '20s remaining after 10s tick');
   274→
   275→  obj.tick(10000);
   276→  assert(obj.timeRemainingMs === 10000, '10s remaining after 20s total');
   277→});
   278→
   279→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   280→// Report
   281→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   282→
   283→console.log(`
${'═'.repeat(50)}`);
   284→console.log(`Object State Machine Tests`);
   285→console.log(`${'═'.repeat(50)}`);
   286→
   287→for (const r of results) {
   288→  console.log(`  ${r.ok ? '✓' : '✗'} ${r.name}${r.error ? ` (${r.error})` : ''}`);
   289→}
   290→
   291→console.log(`
  ${passed} passed, ${failed} failed, ${passed + failed} total`);
   292→console.log(`${'═'.repeat(50)}
`);
   293→
   294→// Export for browser usage
   295→export { results, passed, failed };
   296→
